  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法直接从影像特征预测疗效标签，缺乏临床可检查、可验证和可纠正的透明性，限制了临床实际应用。

Method: TRACE采用共享3D视觉编码器处理配对基线和随访多模态MRI，预测肿瘤测量作为根概念，通过确定性规则推导RANO衍生概念，并融入扫描间隔和新病变信息作为直通概念，将疗效评估建模为结构化概念推理。

Result: 在LUMIERE数据集上5折交叉验证，4类宏F1为0.4769，二分类进展与非进展宏F1为0.7085，优于概念瓶颈基线，达到非可解释深度学习方法的水平。

Conclusion: 结构化概念瓶颈为胶质母细胞瘤纵向疗效评估提供了透明且符合临床的方向，但需要更大规模标准化数据集和外部验证。

Abstract: Longitudinal glioblastoma response assessment requires comparing subtle tumor changes across MRI time points using structured clinical criteria such as RANO. However, most deep learning methods predict response labels directly from imaging features, which limits clinical inspection, verification, and correction. We introduce TRACE, a RANO 2.0-aligned concept bottleneck model for interpretable 4-class glioblastoma response classification on longitudinal 3D MRI. TRACE processes paired baseline and follow-up multimodal MRI scans with a shared 3D vision encoder, predicts clinically meaningful tumor measurements as root concepts, computes downstream RANO-derived concepts through deterministic rules, and incorporates scan interval and new-lesion information as passthrough concepts. This design frames response assessment as structured concept reasoning rather than direct image-to-label prediction.
  Using 5-fold patient-wise cross-validation on the LUMIERE dataset, TRACE achieves a 4-class macro F1 of 0.4769 and a binary progression-versus-non-progression macro F1 of 0.7085. It improves over a concept bottleneck baseline and remains within the range of published non-interpretable deep learning approaches. Ablation studies show that the expert RANO graph and intervention-consistency training are important for performance, while intervention experiments demonstrate that correcting concepts can improve downstream predictions. These results suggest that structured concept bottlenecks offer a transparent and clinically aligned direction for longitudinal glioblastoma response assessment, while highlighting the need for larger protocol-aligned datasets and external validation.

</details>


### [223] [Real-Time Underwater Image Enhancement via Frequency-Guided Dual-Path Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30314)
*Leshen Zhang,Ao Li,Ce Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种轻量级水下图像增强框架FGDPA，结合多分支可重参数化卷积与固定DCT先验，以及频域引导的双路径注意力模块，仅需4.23K参数和600+ FPS即可实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超轻量级CNN仅工作在空间域，忽略了水下退化的频率敏感特性，难以在低延迟和小模型约束下实现高质量增强。

Method: 提出两个核心组件：1）MBRConv-DCT：在训练时注入结构化方向频率先验的可重参数化卷积；2）FGDPA：通过双路径设计融合空间和频谱特征的自适应调制模块。两个组件均支持结构重参数化，推理时几乎无额外开销。

Result: 仅4.23K参数，600+ FPS速度，在定量指标和视觉质量上均超越更大模型的方法。

Conclusion: 该框架在极低计算开销下有效结合了频域先验与空间特征，为实时水下图像增强提供了高性能且实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Real-time underwater image enhancement (UIE) is crucial for mobile underwater photography and autonomous robotic systems, where practical deployment typically requires low latency and compact models under constrained computational resources. Recent ultra-lightweight CNNs based on structural re-parameterization meet these constraints but operate purely in the spatial domain, ignoring the frequency-sensitive nature of underwater degradation. To address this, we propose a lightweight UIE framework that integrates two key components: a Multi-Branch Reparameterizable Convolution with Fixed DCT Priors (MBRConv-DCT) that injects structured directional frequency priors during training, and a Frequency-Guided Dual-Path Attention (FGDPA) module that fuses spatial and spectral cues via a dual-path design for adaptive feature modulation. Both components are fully compatible with structural re-parameterization: the convolution branch introduces zero additional inference cost after re-parameterization, while the attention module incurs only a minimal computational overhead. Experiments show our model achieves state-of-the-art performance with only 4.23K parameters and 600+ FPS, outperforming much larger methods in both quantitative metrics and visual quality. Code is available at https://github.com/LethyZhang/FGDPA.

</details>


### [224] [BrainJanus: A Unified Model for Understanding and Generation across Brain, Vision, and Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30319)
*Haitao Wu,Qirui Zhang,Zhouheng Yao,Shangquan Sun,Qihao Zheng,Mianxin Liu,Chi Zhang,Wanli Ouyang,Chunfeng Song,Changqing Zhang,Jiamin Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出BrainJanus，首个统一整合脑、视觉与语言的多模态脑模型，通过统一脑分词器将神经信号离散化为共享空间标记，利用全合一自回归架构实现任意模态间双向生成（图像/文本→脑、脑→图像/文本），在多个基准上表现优异，且具备零样本泛化与可解释脑地形图特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脑编码与解码方法多作为孤立任务处理，依赖单模态对齐和外部先验，忽视了脑作为多模态整合系统的本质。

Method: 提出BrainJanus框架，包含：(1) 统一脑分词器（Unified Brain Tokenizer），将连续神经动力学量化为离散标记，并与视觉/语言表示在共享Omni空间中对齐；(2) 全合一自回归架构（All-in-One），通过下一个标记预测实现任意模态到任意模态的生成。

Result: 在多个基准任务上取得优越性能，具备零样本泛化能力，并保持了可解释的生物脑地形图结构。

Conclusion: BrainJanus可作为通用脑建模范式，为脑科学中的多模态统一建模提供了新方向。

Abstract: Modeling the bidirectional correspondence between external sensory stimuli and internal neural activity has emerged as a critical frontier in neuroscience. However, existing approaches predominantly treat brain encoding and decoding as isolated tasks, relying heavily on unimodal alignment and external priors while overlooking the brain's intrinsic nature as a multimodal integration system. To address these limitations, we propose BrainJanus, the first unified brain model that integrates brain, vision, and language within a single framework. Specifically, we introduce a Unified Brain Tokenizer to quantize continuous neural dynamics into discrete tokens aligned with visual and linguistic representations in a shared Omni space. Building on this, we utilize an All-in-One autoregressive architecture that leverages next-token prediction to enable seamless any-to-any generation, which encompasses image-to-brain and text-to-brain encoding, and brain-to-image and brain-to-text decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BrainJanus achieves superior performance across diverse benchmarks. Furthermore, our framework exhibits zero-shot generalization and preserves interpretable biological topography, highlighting its potential as a general-purpose brain modeling paradigm. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/HaitaoWuTJU/BrainJanus}{GitHub}.

</details>


### [225] [Optimizing Image Preparation and Compression for Face Recognition within 1024 Bytes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30321)
*Paul Andreas,Torsten Schlett,Christoph Busch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究探讨如何将临时旅行证件上的面部图像压缩至1024字节以内，同时最大限度保留人脸识别性能。实验表明，JPEG AI在优化设置下表现最佳，AVIF和WebP也表现良好。灰度预处理对ICAO合规图像有效，而低质量图像则需保留颜色信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临时旅行证件缺乏机器可读性，无法进行自动化生物特征验证。2D条码技术是RFID芯片的低成本替代方案，但存储容量极为有限（仅1024字节），亟需研究如何在极端压缩下仍保持可用的人脸识别性能。

Method: 研究使用JPEG、JPEG 2000、JPEG XL、JPEG AI、HEIF、AVIF和WebP七种图像压缩标准，将面部图像压缩至1024字节以内。实验分两种场景：参考样本始终符合ICAO规范，个体样本可满足或可不满足规范。优化了预处理步骤（灰度转换、平滑、调整大小）和压缩配置。

Result: JPEG AI在优化设置下提供了最佳人脸识别性能，尤其当比较图像均为高质量面部图像时；AVIF和WebP也表现良好。强有损压缩导致的性能损失相对较小。对于ICAO合规图像，灰度预处理有帮助；对于低质量样本，保留颜色更佳。平滑和调整大小预处理也有益。

Conclusion: 2D条码可作为RFID芯片的可行替代方案用于临时旅行证件，其中JPEG AI是最优压缩选择。预处理策略需根据图像质量调整：高质量图像用灰度，低质量图像保留颜色。

Abstract: ICAO-compliant machine readable travel documents enable automated biometric face verification. The biometric reference is stored on an RFID chip included in form of a JPEG or JPEG 2000 compressed facial image. In contrast, temporary travel documents lack of machine readability, which excludes the owner from such automated processes. This disadvantage could be solved by equipping such documents with 2D barcodes. This technology offers a resource-saving alternative to expensive RFID chips, while still offering machine readability and fast issuing processes. However, this solution introduces the challenge of storing the face images at significantly smaller storage capacities, creating the need for reducing the file size of the included facial image to a maximum of 1024 bytes. This study examines preprocessing steps and compression configurations, using JPEG, JPEG 2000, JPEG XL, JPEG AI, HEIF, AVIF, and WebP for image compression to this target size, while still preserving as much face recognition performance as possible. While the reference sample must always comply with ICAO specifications, the individual samples may or may not meet these requirements, depending on the application. This work optimizes compression steps for both of these prerequisites. It is shown that the recently standardised JPEG AI, when using optimized settings, provides the best face recognition performance, in particular when the comparison includes only images with high face image quality. AVIF and WebP also provide good results. The losses caused by the strong lossy compression are comparatively small. For the comparison of ICAO-compliant face images only, converting the images to grayscale proves to be a helpful preprocessing step, whereas for comparisons involving less suitable samples, preserving color is preferable. In addition, smoothing and resizing the images beforehand also turns out to be beneficial.

</details>


### [226] [UniGP: Taming Diffusion Transformer for Prior-Preserved Unified Generation and Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30332)
*Qin Guo,Hao Luo,Dongxu Yue,Weixuan Jin,Xiao Fu,Fan Wang,Dan Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UniGP基于MMDiT架构，通过简单联合训练统一了可控图像生成与密集预测任务，无需复杂任务特定设计，在多项任务上达到或超越专用方法水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将扩散模型的可控生成与密集预测作为分离任务处理，忽视了联合建模异构分布（图像-几何对）的潜在优势。

Method: 基于MMDiT构建UniGP框架，包含DUGP模块（仅复制MMDiT图像分支建模密集分布）和统一数据集训练策略，通过简单联合训练统一生成与预测。

Result: 统一模型超越先前统一方法，性能与专用方法相当；多任务联合训练带来互补收益：生成先验丰富感知细节，感知学习改善生成的结构对齐。

Conclusion: UniGP证明了通过简单联合训练即可统一可控生成与密集预测，且多任务学习具有互补增益，为生成与感知的融合提供了有效范式。

Abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have shown impressive performance in controllable image generation and dense prediction tasks. However, existing approaches typically treat diffusion-based controllable generation and dense prediction as separate tasks, overlooking the potential benefits of jointly modeling the heterogeneous distributions. In this work, we introduce UniGP, a framework built upon MMDiT, which unifies controllable generation and dense prediction through simple joint training, without the need for complex task-specific designs or losses, while preserving the backbone's versatile priors. By learning controllable generation and prediction under different conditions, our model effectively captures the joint distribution of image-geometry pairs. UniGP is capable of versatile controllable generation, dense prediction, and joint generation. Specifically, the proposed UniGP consists of DUGP and a unified dataset training strategy. The former, following the principle of Occam's razor, uses only a copied image branch of MMDiT to model dense distributions beyond RGB, while the latter integrates heterogeneous datasets into a unified training framework to jointly model generation and perception tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our unified model surpasses prior unified approaches and performs on par with specialized methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate that multi-task joint training provides complementary benefits: generative priors enrich perceptual details, while perceptual learning improves structural alignment in generation.

</details>


### [227] [A Classifier-Agnostic Zero-Shot Adversarial Attack Detection via CLIP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30342)
*Hodaya Krakover,Meir Yossef Levi,Eyal Gofer,Guy Gilboa*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出A⁴D，一种完全黑盒、零样本的对抗性攻击检测框架，利用CLIP的提示相似度分数，无需攻击特定假设或分类器访问，在多种攻击和数据集上达到SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗攻击检测方法通常依赖攻击特定假设、需要访问对抗样本或了解底层分类器（白盒），缺乏通用性和实用性。

Method: 利用CLIP模型的两个关键观察：(i) CLIP对微小不可感知的非语义扰动敏感；(ii) CLIP嵌入空间的偏移可作为鲁棒的攻击指示器。通过提示相似度分数进行零样本检测。

Result: 在多种攻击、数据集和分类器上的实验验证了A⁴D在攻击无关和分类器无关设定下达到了SOTA检测效果。

Conclusion: A⁴D是首个利用CLIP进行对抗攻击检测的工作，证明了CLIP在通用对抗检测中的有效性，为黑盒零样本检测提供了新方向。

Abstract: Adversarial attacks pose a challenge to the reliability of deep learning models, motivating effective detection methods. Existing techniques often rely on attack-specific assumptions, access to adversarial samples, or knowledge of the underlying classifier (white-box). We propose \textit{$A^4D$ (\textbf{A}ttack- and \textbf{A}rchitecture-\textbf{A}gnostic \textbf{A}dversarial \textbf{D}etector)}, a completely black-box, zero-shot adversarial attack detection framework that utilizes prompt-based similarity scores derived from CLIP. To the best of our knowledge this is the first attempt to utilize CLIP for such a task. The method is based on two key observations: (i) CLIP is sensitive even to small imperceptible non-semantic perturbations; (ii) The shift in CLIP embedding space is not arbitrary and can be used as a robust attack indicator. Experiments across multiple attacks, datasets and classifiers validate that $A^4D$ achieves SOTA detection results in the attack-agnostic and classifier-agnostic setting.

</details>


### [228] [Early Cue Precision Shapes Visual Shortcut Learning in Controlled Cue-Manipulation Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30344)
*Chanho Park,Woochan Lee,Janyeong Oh,Geongho Gong,Minshu Kim,Yeachan Kwak,Seongim Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 视觉分类器在分布匹配下准确率高，但依赖低级线索（如纹理），当线索冲突或精度变化时表现急剧下降；研究发现早期线索精度越低，后续冲突准确率反而更高，但微调会迅速覆盖这一优势，因此线索去相关需在适应过程中持续维持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究视觉分类器在依赖低级线索（如纹理）时，早期线索精度（low-level cue precision）如何影响其在冲突或抑制条件下的失败模式，以及这种影响是否在早期学习或下游探针拟合阶段形成。

Method: 设计多组实验：合成形状-纹理任务、序列数字训练、10类冻结表示审计、CIFAR-10自然图像纹理覆盖基准；操纵对象-纹理匹配概率，评估匹配ID准确率、冲突准确率、纹理选择率、抑制行为；并变化纹理覆盖强度α（0.15-0.50）及端到端训练与微调对比。

Result: 退化但有预测性的输入不能替代线索去相关。10类数字探针中冲突准确率从0.589（随机精度）降至0.005（完美纹理）。CIFAR-10探针中冲突准确率从0.569降至0.114，纹理选择率从0.049升至0.855。端到端训练中低早期精度有益，但微调快速覆盖该优势。

Conclusion: 线索去相关不能作为一次性措施，必须在下游适应过程中持续维持，否则微调带来的捷径丰富会迅速破坏早期低精度带来的鲁棒性优势。

Abstract: Visual classifiers can achieve high matched-distribution accuracy while relying on low-level cues that fail under conflict or suppression. We test whether this failure is shaped by early cue precision: the reliability with which a low-level cue predicts the label during early learning or downstream probe fitting. Across synthetic shape-texture tasks, sequential digit training, a 10-class frozen-representation audit, and a CIFAR-10 natural-image-based texture-overlay benchmark, we manipulate object-texture match probability and evaluate matched-ID accuracy, conflict accuracy, texture-choice rate, and suppression behavior. Degraded-but-predictive input does not substitute for cue decorrelation. In 10-class digit probes, conflict accuracy drops from 0.589 under chance-like cue precision to 0.005 under target-perfect texture. In CIFAR-10 frozen probes, conflict accuracy drops from 0.569 to 0.114, while texture choice rises from 0.049 to 0.855; this ordering persists across texture-overlay strengths alpha in {0.15,0.25,0.35,0.50}. End-to-end CIFAR-10 training shows that low early cue precision improves pre-target conflict behavior, but shortcut-rich fine-tuning can rapidly overwrite this benefit. Cue decorrelation must therefore be maintained during downstream adaptation rather than treated as a one-time inoculation.

</details>


### [229] [FFAvatar: Feed-Forward 4D Head Avatar Reconstruction from Sparse Portrait Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30347)
*Jianjiang Yao,Ke Xian,Renxiang Dai,Robert Caiming Qiu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FFAvatar是一个基于Transformer的3D高斯框架，能够从一张或多张参考肖像图像快速构建高质量、可动画化的4D头部化身，支持增量重建、交替注意力机制、稀疏到密集的学习范式以及运动细化模块。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有前馈方法需要固定数量的输入视图，缺乏灵活性和增量重建能力，同时难以在身份外观与表情、视角变化之间进行有效解耦。

Method: 提出交替注意力机制解耦身份外观与表情/视角变化；采用稀疏到密集的学习范式（先在FLAME顶点层学习粗粒度特征，再在UV域密集化）；引入即插即用的运动细化模块建模残差运动。

Result: FFAvatar能高效生成高保真、可控的4D头部化身，在不同表情和视角下实现灵活驱动、身份一致的渲染效果。

Conclusion: FFAvatar在重建灵活性、驱动效率和身份一致性方面优于现有方法，为4D头部化身的高效构建提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present FFAvatar, a Transformer-based 3D Gaussian framework for fast construction of high-quality and animatable 4D head avatars from one or more reference portrait images. Unlike existing feed-forward approaches that require a fixed number of input views, FFAvatar supports incremental reconstruction, progressively refining the avatar representation as additional reference images become available. At the core of our method is an alternating attention mechanism that disentangles identity appearance from expression and viewpoint variations, enabling the reconstruction of a canonical 3D appearance that remains consistent across poses and facial expressions. To balance visual fidelity and computational efficiency, we introduce a sparse-to-dense learning paradigm. Coarse appearance features are first learned using sparse primitives anchored to the FLAME vertex level and are subsequently densified in the UV domain to capture fine-grained geometric and texture details. We further propose a plug-and-play motion refinement module that enables subject-specific dynamic personalization by modeling residual motion beyond parametric deformation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FFAvatar efficiently produces high-fidelity and controllable 4D head avatars, achieving superior flexibility, driving efficiency, and identity-consistent rendering across diverse expressions and viewpoints.

</details>


### [230] [FastPano3D: Feed-Forward Indoor Panoramic 3D Reconstruction from a Single Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30352)
*Jianqiang Li,Liumei Zhang,Wenjia Guo,Tianlong Feng,Yongzhi Liao,Di Lu,Hanchi Ren,Jingjing Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FastPano3D是一种端到端框架，能从单张全景图像直接生成可渲染的3D高斯表示，无需测试时优化，在数秒内重建高保真3D室内场景，推理速度比现有方法快156倍，参数量仅为其一半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D场景重建方法在渲染质量、推理效率和数据依赖之间存在权衡，难以从极少输入（如单张全景图）快速重建细节丰富的3D室内场景，且全景图像的畸变和非均匀特征分布给前馈式高斯生成带来挑战。

Method: 采用轻量级特征编码器、自适应高斯采样和点云引导的精炼策略，实现无需测试优化的端到端3D高斯生成。

Result: 在数秒内完成高保真3D场景重建，推理速度比Pano2Room等最先进方法快156倍，参数量仅为其一半，渲染质量与NeRF和3DGS方法相当。

Conclusion: FastPano3D为单视图快速3D场景推理建立了新的基准，有效平衡了渲染质量、推理效率和数据依赖性。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D scene reconstruction have highlighted the intricate trade-offs among rendering quality, inference efficiency, and data dependency. To address the challenge of rapidly reconstructing detailed 3D indoor scenes from minimal input, we introduce FastPano3D, an end-to-end framework that directly generates renderable 3D Gaussian representations from a single panoramic image. Unlike perspective-based methods, panoramic images inherently suffer from equirectangular projection distortions and spatially non-uniform feature distributions, making direct feed-forward Gaussian generation particularly challenging. In contrast to existing Gaussian Splatting based methods that rely on multi-view supervision or per-scene optimization, FastPano3D employs a lightweight feature encoder, adaptive Gaussian sampling, and a point-cloud-guided refinement strategy to achieve efficient and accurate scene generation without any test-time optimization. Our approach reconstructs high-fidelity 3D scenes within seconds, achieving up to 156 times faster inference than prior state-of-the-art methods such as Pano2Room, while using only half the parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FastPano3D delivers rendering quality comparable to NeRF- and 3DGS-based reconstructions, establishing a new benchmark for rapid, single-view 3D scene inference.

</details>


### [231] [Residual-Guided Expert Specialization for Incomplete Multimodal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30355)
*Seunghun Baek,Jihwan Park,Jaeyoon Sim,Minjae Jeong,Hoseok Lee,Won Hwa Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出MARS框架，通过缺失感知的残差信号引导专家网络专门化，解决不完整多模态学习问题，在分类和分割任务上超越基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际预测系统在推理时经常面临模态缺失，现有方法虽能学习鲁棒表示，但不完整模态的表示与完整模态相比存在偏差，需要显式利用这些偏差来提升模型性能。

Method: 提出MARS框架：1）通过对比完整与不完整输入的任务表示，得到残差信号；2）残差路由器根据残差信号分配样本给对应偏差模式的专家；3）特征路由器模仿残差路由器的行为，仅依赖不完整输入；4）引入差异感知噪声正则化，缓解训练-测试路由器差距。

Result: 在CASIA-SURF、CREMA-D、UPMC Food-101（分类）和MCubeS（分割）等数据集上，在模态缺失场景下，MARS一致超过基线方法，且保持高效性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: MARS通过显式利用缺失引起的表示偏差指导专家专门化，能有效提升不完整多模态学习性能，且可扩展至不同骨干网络和任务。

Abstract: As real-world prediction systems often face missing modalities at inference, incomplete multimodal learning (IML) remains a practical challenge. While prior methods aim to learn representations robust to missing inputs, representations from incomplete modalities inevitably deviate from their full-modality counterparts due to missing evidence. To explicitly leverage these deviations, we propose MARS (Missingness-Aware Residual-guided Specialization), a mixture-of-experts framework that guides expert specialization based on how representations are reshaped by missingness. By contrasting task representations derived from incomplete inputs with their complete counterparts during training, we derive a privileged residual signal that captures this representational gap. The residual signal guides a residual router to assign samples to experts specialized for the corresponding deviation patterns. In parallel, a feature router learns to imitate this routing behavior using only incomplete inputs, enabling deployment without access to full modalities. To mitigate this train-test router gap, we develop a discrepancy-aware noise regularization that adaptively perturbs the residual router's decisions when the feature router deviates, enhancing expert robustness under imperfect imitation. Experiments on multimodal classification (CASIA-SURF, CREMA-D, UPMC Food-101) and segmentation (MCubeS) under missing scenarios show that MARS consistently surpasses baselines while remaining efficient and extensible to diverse backbones and tasks.

</details>


### [232] [CouCE: A Unified Causal Framework for Debiased Deep Metric Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30365)
*Xin Yuan,Zhenyang Niu,Meiqi Wan,Huilin Zhu,Xin Xu,Kui Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Counterfactual Causal Embedding (CouCE)统一因果框架，通过正交字典后门调整（ODBA）和多尺度随机因果干预（MSRCI）分别处理背景虚假相关和前景扰动，实现深度度量学习中的去偏表示学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度度量学习方法因混淆因子（背景虚假相关和前景扰动）导致零样本泛化能力差，且现有方法只能单独处理其中一种，无法同时应对两种因果路径的干扰。

Method: 1）正交字典后门调整（ODBA）：通过方差门控字典提取背景模式，用软正交正则化解耦嵌入；2）多尺度随机因果干预（MSRCI）：通过多尺度傅里叶幅度随机化与对称KL不变性约束，强制模型对前景扰动保持因果不变性。

Result: 在CUB-200-2011、Cars-196和Stanford Online Products三个基准数据集上取得最先进性能。

Conclusion: CouCE提供了统一、原理性的去偏DML方案，无需推理阶段修改架构，可无缝集成任意基于代理的损失函数。

Abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) often struggles with zero-shot generalization because standard objectives inherently capture what co-occurs rather than what causes similarity. Consequently, DML models are vulnerable to shortcut learning driven by two structurally distinct confounders: background spurious correlations (which create backdoor paths via scene context) and foreground nuisance perturbations (which inject non-semantic variations like pose or illumination). Although existing methods have proposed targeted solutions for each pathway individually, none can simultaneously address both due to their fundamentally distinct causal roles. To bridge this gap, we propose the Counterfactual Causal Embedding (CouCE), a unified causal framework that explicitly models and neutralizes both confounders. Specifically, we introduce Orthogonal Dictionary-Based Backdoor Adjustment (ODBA), which isolates spurious background patterns into a variance-gated dictionary and stably disentangles them from the learned embeddings via soft orthogonal regularization. Simultaneously, we propose Multi-Scale Randomized Causal Intervention (MSRCI) to enforce causal invariance against foreground nuisances through multi-scale Fourier amplitude randomization and a symmetric KL invariance constraint. Notably, CouCE seamlessly integrates with any proxy-based loss, incurring modest training overhead without requiring architectural modifications during inference. Extensive experiments on CUB-200-2011, Cars-196, and Stanford Online Products demonstrate that CouCE consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, providing a principled and robust solution for debiased DML.

</details>


### [233] [MUSE: Unlocking Timestep as Native Task Steering for One-Step Dense Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30370)
*Shuo Zhou,Zhaoxin Li,Xiujuan Chai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现单步扩散模型中固定时间步嵌入可作为内生任务导向信号，提出无需额外参数的MUSE框架，实现多任务密集预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多任务扩散方法引入大量参数（适配器、专家模块、任务标记），导致计算冗余，缺乏高效的多任务学习范式。

Method: 利用单步扩散模型中固定正弦时间步嵌入作为任务导向信号，通过流形解耦机制将离散时间步值引导生成过程进入任务特定流形，实现参数共享的单模型多任务密集预测（MUSE）。

Result: 在10个数据集上，MUSE在单目深度估计和法线估计任务上均取得极具竞争力的性能，且方法在U-Net和DiT架构上均有效。

Conclusion: 通过简单解锁现有生成基础设施的潜在能力，为通用视觉模型提供了一条简洁高效的路径。

Abstract: Monocular dense prediction has recently seen remarkable success by repurposing pre-trained diffusion models. This opens a promising yet challenging avenue for more efficient multi-task learning paradigm. However, existing multi-task diffusion methods often introduce parameter-heavy adapters, experts, or learnable task tokens, leading to computational redundancy. In this paper, we reveal an inherent mechanism within one-step diffusion models: the native, fixed sinusoidal timestep embedding can be repurposed as an endogenous task steering signal. Based on this discovery, we propose Multi-task Unified eStimation via timestep Embedding (MUSE), a parameter-free, single-model multi-tasking approach for dense prediction. We interpret this mechanism via Manifold Decoupling, where discrete, fixed timestep values deterministically steer the generation process towards decoupled, task-specific manifolds in the latent space. Extensive experiments across 10 datasets demonstrate that MUSE achieves highly competitive performance on both monocular depth and normal estimation, and its efficacy generalizes across U-Net and DiT architectures. Our work offers a concise and efficient path toward generalist vision models by simply unlocking the latent potential of existing generation infrastructure.

</details>


### [234] [Set-Inclusive Uncertainty Modeling for Robust Brain Tumor Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30374)
*Seunghun Baek,Jihwan Park,Jaeyoon Sim,Hoseok Lee,Seungjoo Lee,Won Hwa Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出概率表示框架，将特征建模为高斯分布，用均值捕获任务信息、方差衡量缺失模态带来的不确定性，并通过集合包含策略保持子集间的不确定性一致性，在缺失模态场景下优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态MRI对脑肿瘤分割至关重要，但推理时部分模态缺失不可避免，现有方法将不完整证据编码为确定性表示，缺乏对不确定性的建模，导致结果不可靠。

Method: 1) 将特征表示为高斯分布（均值捕获任务信息，方差量化缺失证据的不确定性）；2) 对齐各缺失配置的均值到完整模态均值，并用对齐差异来缩放方差；3) 集合包含策略利用模态子集的层级结构，施加排序约束以保持不确定性关系的一致性。

Result: 在BraTS 2018和2020数据集上，该方法在多种缺失模态场景下均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提出的概率表示框架有效建模了缺失模态带来的不确定性，提升了脑肿瘤分割的可靠性和性能。

Abstract: Multimodal MRI is essential for accurate brain tumor segmentation. However, acquiring all modalities at inference is often challenging in practice, which causes intrinsic uncertainty due to unavoidable information loss. Without modeling this uncertainty, existing methods encode incomplete evidence into deterministic representations that appear plausible but lack reliability. In this regime, we propose a probabilistic representation framework that models representations as Gaussian distributions, where their mean captures task information and their variance measures uncertainty from missing evidence. To make variance reflect information deficiency, we regularize the mean from each partial configuration toward its full-modality counterpart, while scaling the variance with the discrepancy between their aligned means. We further introduce a set-inclusive strategy that exploits the hierarchical structure of modality subsets and enforces an ordering constraint to maintain their consistent uncertainty relationships. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2018 and 2020 demonstrate that our approach offers superior performance over baselines across diverse missing-modality scenarios. Code and model checkpoint are available at https://github.com/atlas-sky/SIUM.

</details>


### [235] [OmniCoT: A Benchmark for Global and Multi-Step Panoramic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30378)
*Haocong He,Chenfei Liao,Zichen Wen,Zihao Dongfang,Xu Zheng,Bin Ren,Chang Su,Zixin Zhang,Harold Haodong Chen,Hongfei Zhang,Weijia Li,Kailun Yang,Conghui He,Xuming Hu,Nicu Sebe,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OmniCoT是一个面向全景图像的空间推理套件，通过构建多步Chain-of-Thought数据集和两阶段训练策略，提升多模态大模型在全景空间中利用全局证据进行复杂推理的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全景基准多聚焦于依赖局部线索或单/少步推理的简单查询，未能利用全景图像360°×180°视场角所支持的全局多步推理优势，限制了MLLMs在全景空间推理上的潜力。

Method: 构建OmniCoT-B（6.7K评估数据）、OmniCoT-Real（1K真实标注子集）和OmniCoT-T（14.3K训练数据，含结构化分步CoT标注）；提出OmniCoT-R1模型，采用SFT（将推理锚定到全景证据如方位、邻近性）和GRPO（惩罚几何不一致路径）两阶段训练策略。

Result: OmniCoT套件能够有效评估和提升MLLMs在全景空间中的多步推理能力，量化了Sim-to-Real差距，并通过结构化CoT训练实现了更好的推理可解释性和空间一致性。

Conclusion: 通过OmniCoT重新校准全景空间推理的难度标准，使其更好地对齐全景图像的内在能力，推动该研究领域的实质性进展。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated promising spatial reasoning capabilities, while these abilities remain underexplored in the emerging visual modality of panoramic imagery. The full 360°$\times$180° field of view of panoramas essentially supports complex global multi-step reasoning, which is also the fundamental advantage of panoramas in applications such as embodied intelligence. However, existing panoramic benchmarks largely focus on simplistic queries that rely on local cues or single-/few-step reasoning, thereby ignoring the fundamental advantage of panoramas and failing to fully exploit their potential. To address this gap, we introduce OmniCoT, a panoramic spatial reasoning suite designed to enable MLLMs to use global evidence and perform multi-step inference across viewpoints. It includes OmniCoT-B (6.7K data) for evaluation, which measures both answer accuracy and reasoning quality, OmniCoT-Real (1K data) as a manually annotated real-world subset to quantify the Sim-to-Real gap. For training, OmniCoT-T (14.3K data) is purpose-built with structured stepwise Chain-of-Thought annotations that explicitly link intermediate reasoning steps to panoramic evidence. Based on OmniCoT-T, we introduce OmniCoT-R1 and adopt a two-stage training strategy tailored to the geometrically complex panoramic space, where Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) anchors reasoning to panoramic evidence (e.g., bearings, proximity) and GRPO penalizes geometrically incoherent paths to consolidate global 360° spatial consistency. Through OmniCoT, we aim to recalibrate the difficulty of panoramic spatial reasoning to better align with the intrinsic capabilities of panoramic imagery, thereby fostering meaningful progress in this research area.

</details>


### [236] [SADL: What to Ignore? A Benchmark for Subject-Aware Distractor Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30393)
*Cao-Tri Nguyen,Nguyen-Khoa Luong,Vinh-Tiep Nguyen,Minh-Triet Tran*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了SADL，首个面向主体意识干扰物定位的真实世界基准，包含1,800个案例和14,617个标注候选，用于评估VLM在干扰物识别与排除过滤中的表现，发现VLM虽能识别干扰物但过度应用排除规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑中干扰物识别依赖人工，现有模型缺乏主体意识且上下文无关的移除会破坏语义连贯性。

Method: 构建SADL基准（1,800个案例、14,617个标注），定义五项包含因子与三项上下文排除规则，采用分类+过滤的顺序管道评估七种VLM。

Result: VLM能有效识别干扰物，但过度应用排除规则，系统性地抑制了真正的干扰物。

Conclusion: SADL为多模态系统的主体条件推理提供了基础诊断工具，揭示了当前VLM在干扰物定位中的关键瓶颈。

Abstract: Photographs frequently contain \emph{visual distractors} besides foregrounds and backgrounds of the intended subject, competing for attention and weakening composition. While modern editing tools streamline object removal, identifying which objects to remove remains a mostly manual process. Existing saliency models and open-vocabulary detectors operate without subject awareness, failing to adapt to shifting user intent. Furthermore, context-agnostic removal may disrupt the scene's semantic coherence (e.g., keep the person but remove the chair they are sitting on). To address these limitations, we formalize the task of subject-aware distractor localization, which identifies distractors while retaining compositionally essential objects. This paper introduces \textsc{SADL}, the first real-world benchmark for this task, comprising 1,800 subject-aware cases across 1,000 photographs to enable systematic evaluation and facilitate future research. In total, there are 14,617 annotated candidates, including a robust set of 1,938 hard negatives to stress-test exclusion calibration. We evaluate seven proprietary and open-weight Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on a sequential pipeline of distractor classification followed by exclusion filtering, structured around five inclusion factors and three contextual exclusion rules. Our analysis reveals that VLMs are highly capable of identifying distractors, but then over-apply exclusion, which systematically suppresses true distractors at scale. By exposing this critical bottleneck, \textsc{SADL} provides a foundational diagnostic tool to advance subject-conditioned reasoning in multimodal systems.

</details>


### [237] [SA-Homo: Scale Adaptive Homography Estimation for Scale Variation Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30408)
*Shangxuan Xie,Haifeng Wu,Yuhang Wang,Huarong Jia,Wen Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出SA-Homo，一种尺度自适应的单应性估计框架，通过层次化尺度对齐策略（全局粗对齐+局部精调）解决大尺度差异下的鲁棒匹配问题，在8倍尺度差异下仍保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法在图像对存在显著尺度差异时性能严重下降，因为它们依赖有限的位移假设和局部特征一致性，这些假设在大尺度差距下不成立。

Method: 提出SA-Homo框架，包含(1)尺度感知差异桥接模块(SDBM)：利用多尺度线性注意力级联(MLAC)捕获长程依赖，以及全局跨尺度相似性矩阵块(CSMB)进行尺度鲁棒的相关性表示；(2)轻量级迭代单应估计精化模块(IHERM)：利用局部相关性逐步精化结果。采用从全局到局部的层次化尺度对齐策略。

Result: 在常规尺度相似场景和具有挑战性的尺度变化场景中均优于现有方法，即使在8倍尺度差异下仍保持高精度。同时贡献了HMSA数据集（高分辨率多模态卫星基准）。

Conclusion: SA-Homo通过层次化全局到局部的尺度对齐策略，有效解决了大尺度差异下单应性估计的难题，为实际应用中的尺度变化场景提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Homography estimation, as one of the fundamental problems in computer vision, remains challenged by scale variation scenarios where image pairs potentially exhibit significant scale discrepancies. Existing deep learning frameworks frequently suffer from a significant performance degradation in such cases, as they rely on limited displacement assumptions and local feature consistency that might not hold under large scale gaps. In this paper, we propose SA-Homo, a novel scale-adaptive homography estimation framework designed to achieve robust alignment across a wide range of scale discrepancy ratios. We adopt a hierarchical scale alignment strategy that transitions from the global perspective with a heavy module to a local perspective with a light module. Specifically, we introduce the Scale-aware Discrepancy Bridging Module (SDBM) for initial alignment, which utilizes a Multi-scale Linear Attention Cascade (MLAC) to capture long-range dependencies and mitigate feature inconsistencies, along with a global Cross-scale Similarity Matrix Block (CSMB) for scale robust correlation representation. Once the initial scale gap is bridged, a lightweight Iterative Homography Estimation Refinement Module (IHERM) progressively polishes the result using local correlations. To facilitate this research, we contribute the HMSA dataset, a high-resolution, multi-modal satellite benchmark specifically tailored for scale-variant challenges. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SA-Homo maintains high precision even under 8$\times$ scale discrepancies, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in both conventional scale-similar scenarios and challenging scale variation scenarios. Code and collected datasets are available at https://github.com/shangxuanx330/SA_Homo

</details>


### [238] [Beyond Point Estimates for Glaucoma Visual Field Forecasting with Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30417)
*Marta Colmenar Herrera,Pablo Márquez Neila,Şerife Seda Kucur Ergünay,Martin S. Zinkernagel,Raphael Sznitman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于条件去噪扩散模型的视野预测方法，通过生成未来视野的概率分布来量化不确定性，在两个独立队列上实现了更优的校准性能和预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视野预测方法多为单一点估计，无法表征疾病进展异质性和测量变异性带来的固有不确定性。

Method: 将视野预测形式化为概率预测问题，利用条件去噪扩散模型从不规则随访的纵向观测中生成未来视野的分布。

Result: 在两个独立视野队列上，扩散模型生成的分布校准良好；在点估计任务上达到了最先进的预测精度。

Conclusion: 分布建模在视野预测中具有优势，应推动青光眼风险评估从点估计向不确定性感知的临床可解释方法转变。

Abstract: Forecasting visual fields (VFs) is critical for personalized monitoring and treatment planning in glaucoma. This is inherently uncertain due to heterogeneous disease progression and measurement variability, yet most existing methods produce single deterministic predictions that fail to represent this uncertainty. We formulate VF forecasting as a probabilistic prediction problem and the use of conditioned denoising diffusion models to generate distributions of plausible future VFs from longitudinal observations with irregular follow-up intervals. Experiments on two independent VF cohorts show that diffusion-based predictions produce well-calibrated distributions for clinically relevant VF measures. When reduced to a standard point-estimate, the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy compared to clinical baselines and prior learning-based methods. Our results highlight the advantages of distributional modeling for VF forecasting and support a shift from point-estimate prediction toward uncertainty-aware, clinically interpretable risk assessment in glaucoma.

</details>


### [239] [OWMDrive: Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via 4D Occupancy World Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30421)
*Junjie Cheng,Ruiqi Song,Ye Wu,Nanxing Zeng,Ximiao Li,Yunfeng Ai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OWMDrive是一个基于占用世界模型的多步3D占用预测生成式端到端自动驾驶框架，通过显式建模未来场景演化来引导扩散规划器生成更稳健和安全的驾驶轨迹，在挑战性场景下显著提升规划可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法多基于当前场景的静态表征做决策，缺乏对未来轨迹的显式推演和对交通交互中时序因果动力学的建模，导致在高不确定性条件（如遮挡和突发事件）下规划不稳定或过于保守。

Method: 提出OWMDrive框架，包含：(1) 占用世界模型进行多步3D占用预测；(2) 将预测的未来状态作为条件先验；(3) 扩散规划器基于当前观测和预测未来状态迭代精炼轨迹候选，生成增强的驾驶轨迹。

Result: 实验表明，OWMDrive在规划可靠性和安全性方面显著提升，尤其是在具有挑战性和部分可观测的驾驶场景中效果突出。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模未来时间范围内的场景演化，OWMDrive能够捕获关键的时空因果依赖关系，从而生成更具前瞻性和鲁棒性的轨迹，为端到端自动驾驶提供了一条有效路径。

Abstract: Autonomous driving systems are steadily moving toward end-to-end paradigms to mitigate the limited adaptability of rule-based pipelines in complex traffic environments. However, most existing learning-based methods still make decisions from static representations of the current scene, without explicit future rollouts or modeling of the temporal causal dynamics in traffic interactions. This limitation often results in unstable or overly conservative planning under high-uncertainty conditions, such as occlusions and unexpected events. To overcome these challenges, we introduce OWMDrive, a generative end-to-end driving framework built upon an Occupancy World Model for multi-step 3D occupancy forecasting, which serves as a conditional prior to guide diffusion-based planning. Conditioned on both current observations and predicted future states, the planner iteratively refines trajectory candidates to generate a reinforced driving trajectory. By explicitly modeling scene evolution over future horizons, OWMDrive captures key spatiotemporal causal dependencies, which leads to more foresighted and robust trajectory generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OWMDrive significantly improves planning reliability and safety, especially in challenging and partially observable driving scenarios.

</details>


### [240] [Robust and Efficient Monocular 3D Gaussian SLAM for Kilometer-Scale Outdoor Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30436)
*Sicheng Yu,Dongxu Shen,Beizhen Zhao,Guanzhi Ding,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出KiloGS-SLAM，一种面向千米级室外场景的单目3DGS-SLAM系统，通过运动自适应混合跟踪和生命周期管理的高斯映射策略，在单GPU上实现了超过10,000帧的鲁棒跟踪与高质量重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将单目3DGS-SLAM扩展到千米级室外环境面临两大紧密耦合的挑战：长期位姿跟踪脆弱且大规模建图内存开销过大，现有方法无法同时解决这两个瓶颈。

Method: 1) 运动自适应混合跟踪模块：采用条件触发的三级求解管线，在Essential矩阵与PnP模型间动态切换以处理几何退化，并按需激活基础模型挽救轨迹漂移；2) 生命周期管理的高斯建图策略：结合概率初始化与基于块的多视图稠密化/剪枝，减少图元冗余同时保留高频细节。

Result: 在三个具有挑战性的室外数据集上达到SOTA跟踪精度与渲染质量，成功在单GPU上扩展到超过10,000帧的序列。

Conclusion: 鲁棒的跟踪保证了精确建图所需的几何基础，而内存高效的生命周期管理建图使得大规模运行成为可能，两者协同解决了千米级室外SLAM的挑战。

Abstract: Scaling monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) SLAM to kilometer-level outdoor environments poses two tightly coupled challenges: fragile long-term pose tracking and excessive memory overhead during large-scale mapping. In this paper, we propose KiloGS-SLAM, a highly efficient and robust monocular 3DGS-SLAM system that jointly addresses both bottlenecks. Since high-fidelity scene reconstruction fundamentally relies on drift-free camera poses, we first introduce a motion-adaptive hybrid tracking module. This module features a condition-triggered three-tier solving pipeline. It dynamically switches between Essential matrix and PnP models to handle geometric degeneracies. An on-demand foundation model can also be activated to rescue the trajectory from catastrophic drift. To ensure the system can sustain these long trajectories without memory exhaustion, we subsequently design a lifecycle-managed Gaussian mapping strategy. By integrating probabilistic initialization with chunk-based multi-view densification and pruning, this full-pipeline optimization effectively reduces primitive redundancy while preserving high-frequency details. Together, the robust tracking guarantees the geometric foundation required for accurate mapping, while the memory-efficient lifecycle-managed mapping enables large-scale operation. Extensive experiments across three challenging outdoor datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art tracking accuracy and rendering quality, successfully scaling to sequences of over 10,000 frames on a single GPU.

</details>


### [241] [Cross-Resolution Semantic Transfer for Robust Text-to-Image Retrieval in Low-Resolution Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30458)
*Wenjie Qian,Bin Yang,Xiao Wang,Wenke Huang,Ling Mei,Xin Xu,Mang Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出跨分辨率语义迁移框架(CRST)，解决文本到图像行人重识别中因分辨率差异导致的证据可靠性崩溃和排序分布漂移问题，在三个数据集上显著提升低分辨率检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法忽略了真实监控场景中的分辨率差异，导致低分辨率下视觉token不可靠、混合分辨率图库中检索排序不稳定。

Method: 提出CRST框架，包含三个模块：分辨率条件推理(估计token可靠性)、文本引导精炼(注入语义先验恢复判别线索)、CR-RDA(迁移高分辨率邻域几何结构稳定低分辨率排序)。

Result: 在CUHK-PEDES、ICFG-PEDES、RSTPReid数据集上，超低分辨率Rank-1和mAP平均提升5.7%和5.3%，混合分辨率检索稳定且不牺牲高分辨率精度。

Conclusion: CRST有效解决了跨分辨率TIPR的瓶颈问题，代码将开源。

Abstract: Text-to-image person re-identification (TIPR) retrieves target persons using natural language descriptions. However, existing methods largely overlook resolution variance in real-world surveillance. They characterize cross-resolution TIPR through two coupled failure modes: Evidence Reliability Collapse (ERC), where degraded visual tokens become unreliable for grounding fine-grained text, and Ranking Distribution Drift (RDD), where mixed-resolution galleries distort similarity neighborhoods and destabilize retrieval rankings. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-Resolution Semantic Transfer (CRST), a CLIP-style framework with three modules: resolution-conditioned reasoning, text-guided refinement and CR-RDA. Resolution-conditioned reasoning estimates token reliability to suppress corrupted evidence. Text-guided refinement injects semantic priors to recover discriminative cues. CR-RDA transfers HR neighborhood geometry to stabilize LR ranking under mixed resolutions. Experiments on CUHK-PEDES, ICFG-PEDES, and RSTPReid show that CRST improves ultra-low-resolution Rank-1 and mAP on average by 5.7% and 5.3%, while stabilizing mixed-resolution retrieval without sacrificing high-resolution accuracy.The code will be made publicly available.

</details>


### [242] [FR-DETR: Frequency and Recurrent Feature Refinement for Robust Object Detection under Adverse Weather](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30471)
*Tuan-Duc Nguyen,Duc-Trong Le*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FR-DETR提出了一种以检测器为中心的框架，通过频率精化模块和循环焦点精化模块在特征层面进行增强，而非传统图像增强方法，从而在恶劣天气下实现高效且准确的目标检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 恶劣天气下的目标检测因视觉退化和域偏移而极具挑战性。现有增强器级联检测器的方法存在冗余特征提取、高计算成本和精度提升有限的问题。

Method: 提出FR-DETR框架：(1) 频率精化模块，动态分离并重新加权低高频分量，提升前景-背景区分度；(2) 循环焦点精化模块，利用粗预测结果迭代精化特征。

Result: 在恶劣天气条件下，FR-DETR实现了优越的检测精度，同时计算效率显著高于基于增强器的方法。

Conclusion: 以检测器为中心、在特征层面进行针对性增强的范式，比传统图像增强级联方法更高效、更准确，为恶劣天气下的目标检测提供了新思路。

Abstract: Object detection under adverse weather remains challenging due to severe visual degradations and domain shifts. Existing enhancer-based approaches attempt to improve detection by cascading an enhancer with a detector, but they introduce redundant feature extraction and incur high computational cost with limited accuracy gains when paired with SOTA detectors. We propose FR-DETR, a detector-centric framework that refines features rather than images, focusing enhancement on regions of interest and leveraging frequency-domain cues. Specifically, we design (I) a Frequency Refinement Module that dynamically separates and reweights low- and high-frequency components to improve foreground-background discrimination, and (II) a Recurrent Focus Refinement Module (RFRM) that iteratively refines features using coarse predictions as guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FR-DETR achieves superior detection accuracy under adverse weather while being significantly more computationally efficient than enhancer-based methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ducnt1210/FR-DETR.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [243] [Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28354)
*Irene Strauss,Alexandra Butoi,Ryan Cotterell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文在语言生成极限框架下，引入精确率概念，将覆盖度与有效性的矛盾重新定义为经典的召回率-精确率权衡，并分析了允许有限错误（频率趋近于0）以及放宽新颖性约束等更接近大语言模型实际场景的条件下的生成性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统语言识别极限模型将学习视为对手揭示字符串与学习者识别语言之间的博弈，而新框架转向语言生成，但暴露出覆盖度与有效性的根本矛盾。本文旨在通过精确率-召回率权衡来形式化并分析这一矛盾。

Method: 本文引入精确率概念重新定义问题，分析在不同枚举、新颖性和有效性约束下的极限生成行为。特别地，允许学习者无限次犯错（只要频率趋近于0以保持精确率为1），并研究新颖性约束的连续松弛（要求固定比例输出为新颖）。

Result: 允许精确率为1但非最终有效的学习者，在对手永久隐藏大部分目标语言时能够严格提升召回率。对新颖性约束的连续松弛也提供了更灵活的性能边界。

Conclusion: 本文朝着更真实的大语言模型生成建模迈进一步，表明在不可避免的偶尔错误和重复下，可以通过控制其频率来平衡精确率与召回率。

Abstract: The classic paradigm of language identification in the limit models learning as a game between an adversary, who reveals strings from an unknown target language, and a learner tasked with identifying that language. The recently introduced framework of language generation in the limit shifted the objective to better reflect modern language modeling, requiring the learner to produce valid, unseen strings from the target language. Related work highlighted a fundamental tension: a broad coverage of the target often comes at the cost of validity. We introduce a new notion of precision and recast this problem as the classic recall-precision trade-off. We analyze generation in the limit under varying constraints on enumeration, novelty, and validity, aimed at reflecting settings closer to those encountered by large language models. A key contribution is our analysis of learners that are not eventually valid: we allow infinitely many mistakes, provided their frequency tends to zero so that precision remains one. We show that this relaxation can strictly increase recall when the adversary permanently withholds a large portion of the target language. We also study a continuous relaxation of the novelty constraint that requires only a fixed fraction of outputs to be novel. Taken together, our results move toward a more realistic model of language generation where occasional errors and repetitions are unavoidable, but their rates are controlled.

</details>


### [244] [Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28457)
*Diaa M. Fayed,Aly A. Fahmy,Mohsen A. Rashwan,Wafaa K. Fayed*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种从阿拉伯语-英语Al-Mawrid词典中自动提取词汇信息的方法，利用n-gram分析和KWIC分析发现词汇模式，并通过规则提取形态、句法和语义信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NLP应用需要大量语言知识，电子语言资源的出现使得自动提取词汇信息成为可能，以解决知识获取瓶颈问题。

Method: 使用n-gram分析和关键词上下文（KWIC）分析发现词汇模式；采用手工制作的基于规则的信息提取方法；利用标点符号和启发式方法提取同义词集。

Result: 所有类型信息均获得高精确率；同义词召回率高，其他信息召回率较低；Al-Mawrid词典包含大量派生词、同义词、领域标签和上下位关系。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效从Al-Mawrid词典中自动提取词汇信息，但除同义词外的信息召回率有待提升。

Abstract: Natural language processing (NLP) applications need large and rich amount of linguistic knowledge. Furthermore, electronic language sources such as dictionaries, encyclopedia, and corpora became available. So, automatic methods are emerged to extract lexical information from those sources to overcome the knowledge acquisition bottleneck. We presented a method to automatically extract lexical information from a machine-readable version of the Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary. We used n-gram analysis and key-word-in-context (KWIC) analysis to discover lexical patterns that manifest morphologic, syntactic, or semantic information. Then, we used hand-crafted rule-based information extraction to extract that information. Furthermore, we used punctuation marks and some heuristics to extract a set of synonyms in a subentry. This study registered high precision for all types of information, high recall for synonyms, and low recall for the other information. The study also showed that the Al-Mawrid has significant amount of derivations (morphologic information) and synonyms, domain labels, and hyponym/hypernym relations (semantic information).

</details>


### [245] [Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28524)
*Pamela D. Rivière,Cameron Jones,Sean Trott*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在错误信念任务（FBT）中的表现依赖于模型规模、训练量，并在预训练后期出现，后训练（SFT、DPO）能提升诊断性最高的条件；但表现脆弱，受非事实动词影响，且情境建模能力虽先于并优于FBT，却存在不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有研究表明LLMs对文本描述中智能体的信念状态具有敏感性（通过错误信念任务衡量），但构念效度问题仍存疑。作者采用发展视角，探究模型推理心智状态的模式及其先决条件。

Method: 在Olmo2和Pythia模型套件的多个训练阶段，追踪错误信念任务（FBT）表现及情境建模能力（对场景基本事实属性的报告能力）的涌现模式。测试了模型规模、训练量、预训练vs后训练（SFT、DPO）的影响，以及非事实动词（如"thinks"）对信念归因的干扰。

Result: 1) FBT表现需足够模型规模+充分训练量，在预训练后期涌现；2) 后训练（SFT、DPO）最提升诊断性最强的条件（错误信念-隐式）；3) 非事实动词增加错误信念归因；4) 情境建模准确性通常先于并优于FBT；5) 情境表示存在不一致：Olmo2 13b对永远知情反派的判断，受目标智能体知识状态和非事实动词影响。

Conclusion: 更大、训练充分的模型能按发展顺序构建部分连贯的情境模型，但表现出惊人的脆弱性。这凸显了发展视角和压力测试方法在评估LLM能力中的价值。

Abstract: Recent work suggests that Large Language Models (LLMs) are sensitive to the belief states of agents described by text, as measured by the false belief task (FBT), yet persistent concerns of construct validity remain. We adopt a **developmental perspective**, tracing the pattern of mental state reasoning behavior -- and likely **preconditions** for this behavior -- across multiple training stages in the Olmo2 and Pythia language model suites. We find that above-chance FBT performance depends both on model size and sufficient training volume, emerges relatively late in pretraining, and is most improved by post-training interventions (SFT, DPO) in the condition most diagnostic of mentalizing (False Belief, Implicit). However, FBT performance is fragile: consistent with past work, the use of non-factive verbs (e.g., thinks) increases false belief attributions even in the True Belief condition. To contextualize these findings, we track the emergence of **situation modeling**: the ability to report on basic factual properties of a described scene. Situation modeling accuracy generally precedes and exceeds FBT accuracy, yet situational representations also prove surprisingly incoherent in certain respects: when asked about the knowledge states of the Antagonist agent -- who always knows the item's true location -- Olmo2 13b is consistently influenced both by the Target agent's knowledge state and the presence of non-factive verbs. Together, these results suggest that larger, sufficiently trained models build partially coherent situation models in a developmentally appropriate sequence, yet display surprising fragility -- highlighting the value of developmental and stress-testing approaches for evaluating LLM capabilities.

</details>


### [246] [A French OSCE Dialogue Dataset and Controllable Virtual Patient System for Clinical Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28526)
*Doria Bonzi,Tom Bourgeade,Fabrice Lefèvre,Irina Illina*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的可控管道，用于生成法语OSCE对话数据集，并构建了交互式虚拟病人原型，供医学生练习并获得自动反馈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OSCE考试中医学生培训受限于人类标准化病人数量不足，因此需要开发逼真的虚拟病人来替代，以提升培训规模和效率。

Method: 构建了包含240个法语OSCE对话的数据集，提出了基于LLM的可控生成管道，集成了检索式接地和反思循环等模块，并采用LLM-as-a-Judge的多层次评估框架。

Result: 实验表明，可控性模块通常能提升病人的逼真度和学生评估一致性，并成功实现了一个可供学生练习并接收自动反馈的交互式原型。

Conclusion: 基于LLM的可控管道能有效生成真实感强的虚拟病人对话，提升OSCE培训的可及性和评估一致性，为医学教育提供了可行的技术方案。

Abstract: The clinical and communication skills of medical students are commonly assessed through Objective Structured Clinical Examinations (OSCEs), which consist of brief scenario-driven simulations of doctor-patient interactions. However, training is often limited by the low availability of human standardized patients, motivating the development of realistic virtual patients (VPs). To address this gap, we introduce a French OSCE dialogue dataset comprising 240 student-patient training interactions. We build upon it a controllable LLM-based pipeline to generate synthetic OSCE dialogues. The pipeline integrates modular components, such as retrieval-based grounding and a reflection loop, to ensure patient fidelity, coherence, and realism. Additionally, we propose a multi-level evaluation framework assessing patient simulation quality, student performance, and linguistic quality, using an LLM-as-a-Judge approach. Experiments suggest that controllability modules generally improve patient fidelity and student evaluation consistency. Finally, we implement an interactive prototype in which students can practice with a VP and receive automatic feedback.

</details>


### [247] [Legal Domain Adaptation of Modern BERT Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28538)
*Dominik Stammbach,Peter Henderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了在现代BERT模型（ModernBERT）上进行法律领域自适应微调的效果。通过在美国法院意见数据集上进一步预训练ModernBERT，发现尽管ModernBERT已训练了比原始BERT多500倍的数据，但在法律领域进一步预训练仍能带来显著性能提升，特别是在与美国法院意见相关的任务上。然而，从头开始预训练的效果不如在现有ModernBERT检查点上继续预训练。最终模型可处理长达8,192个token的序列，并可用于法律段落嵌入或搜索排序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究现代BERT模型（ModernBERT）在法律领域的领域自适应效果，验证在已有大量预训练数据基础上，进一步进行领域特定预训练是否能带来性能提升。

Method: 采用掩码语言建模（MLM）目标，在美国所有法院意见数据集上对ModernBERT进行进一步预训练，实现法律领域自适应。

Result: 相比原始ModernBERT，法律领域自适应模型在所有与美法院意见相关的数据集上均取得显著提升；但从头预训练效果不如在现有检查点上继续预训练。

Conclusion: 即使ModernBERT已在大规模数据上预训练，法律领域进一步预训练仍能带来性能提升；模型可处理长序列，适用于法律文本嵌入和搜索排序，且已公开所有检查点。

Abstract: We investigate domain adaptation of modern BERT models in the legal domain. We further pre-train ModernBERT on all US court opinions using the masked language modeling objective. Although ModernBERT has been trained on roughly 500x more data than original BERT, we still find that this model benefits from further pre-training and domain adaptation in the legal domain: we report significant improvements compared to vanilla ModernBERT on all datasets connected to US court opinions. We find gains similar to those reported in early work on domain adaptation of BERT-like models. However, from scratch pre-training does not match the performance of further pre-training an existing ModernBERT checkpoint in our experiments. The resulting models are capable of processing sequences up to 8,192 tokens, and can be used to compute meaningful embeddings of legal passages, or could quickly rerank hundreds of legal passages for a given search query. We release all model checkpoints publicly.

</details>


### [248] [Turn-Averaged SAEs for Feature Discovery and Long-Context Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28548)
*Kevin Der,Harish Kamath,Ben Thompson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种"轮次平均稀疏自编码器"，通过重构模型在单个对话轮次上的平均激活，将每个轮次表示为固定数量的特征，从而解决标准SAE在长上下文下特征数量随长度线性增长的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SAE基于单个token激活，导致活跃特征数量随上下文长度线性增长，难以分析长模型转录文本。

Method: 提出turn-averaged SAE：学习重构模型在单个Human或Assistant轮次上的平均激活，从而用一个固定数量的特征表示整个轮次。

Result: 轮次平均特征比逐token特征更能完整描述单个轮次的高层特征（经LLM评估），且显著简化了归因图等下游任务。

Conclusion: 轮次平均SAE使得在长上下文下进行可解释性分析变得实用可行。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become a useful tool for extracting interpretable features in language models. However, standard SAE architectures operate on individual token activations, meaning that the number of active features scales linearly with context length, and studying long model transcripts becomes difficult. We introduce turn-averaged SAEs, which represent a single Human or Assistant turn with a fixed number of features by learning to reconstruct the average model activation across the turn. We find that turn-averaged features describe a single turn's high-level characteristics more completely than per-token features when judged by an LLM. We also demonstrate that turn-averaged SAEs greatly simplify common downstream uses of SAEs like attribution graphs. Broadly, turn-averaged SAEs make interpretability techniques practical at long context lengths.

</details>


### [249] [Depth-Staggered Fibonacci Spacing for Sparse Attention: Static Schedules Beat Learned Dilation and Extrapolate Where Dense Attention Fails](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28560)
*Chad A. Capps*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了斐波那契间隔的稀疏自注意力机制，发现静态逐层交错（stagger）设置优于固定或学习的alpha参数，所有稀疏变体可外推至4倍训练长度，但稀疏模型在训练长度上的困惑度比稠密基线高约26%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索稀疏自注意力中每层标量alpha（控制关注点间距）的不同设置方式对模型性能的影响，特别关注如何通过静态交错策略提升稀疏注意力的效果和长序列外推能力。

Method: 在21个60M参数、16层的语言模型上，比较了四种alpha设置方式（固定、逐层学习、静态线性交错、互质重分配交错），并与幂2基线的reach匹配对照组进行对比，所有模型使用相同训练配方（426M tokens）。

Result: ①静态逐层交错在困惑度上优于固定和学习alpha，且增益与基数无关；②逐层学习alpha效果不优于静态调度，且推理延迟增加约5倍；③所有稀疏变体可外推至4倍训练长度，而稠密基线困惑度上升201%；④稀疏模型在训练长度上的最佳困惑度仍比稠密基线高约26%。

Conclusion: 静态交错策略是稀疏注意力中简单有效的设计选择，能显著提升长序列外推能力，但训练长度性能与稠密注意力仍有差距，且交错增益在上下文各位置均匀分布而非集中于长距离。

Abstract: We study sparse self-attention in which each query attends to a dense local window plus a set of Fibonacci-spaced offsets, with a per-layer scalar alpha that compresses or expands the spacing. Across 21 language models trained under one matched recipe (60M parameters, 512 hidden, 16 layers, 426M tokens), we compare four ways of setting alpha across depth: fixed, per-layer learned, a static linear stagger, and a coprime (anti-gridding) reassignment of that stagger, together with a reach-matched power-of-2 control. Three results stand out. First, a static per-layer stagger improves perplexity over both fixed and learned alpha, and the gain is base-agnostic: applying the same stagger to a power-of-2 base lifts it above fixed Fibonacci and to parity with learned Fibonacci attention. Second, learning per layer is inert: it does not beat the static schedule and costs roughly five times the inference latency. Third, and most consequential, all sparse variants extrapolate to four times their training length with little or no degradation, whereas a recipe-matched dense baseline collapses (perplexity rises by 201% at 4x length); we attribute this to fixed-offset attention only ever querying relative positions seen during training. We also report two honest negatives: at training length the best sparse model has about 26% higher perplexity than the dense baseline, and the staggering gain is uniform across context positions rather than concentrated at long range.

</details>


### [250] [SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28562)
*Chia-Hsuan Lee,Zelei Cheng,Yu Wang,Renkun Ni,Sambit Sahu,Shi-Xiong Zhang,William Campbell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SEAD利用熵作为统一探针，在三种尺度上解决基于能力的教师监督退化问题，在OLMo-3上相比普通OPD提升4.8%平均准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有同策略蒸馏（OPD）中教师监督质量依赖于学生能力，不一致的rollout产生噪声梯度，已掌握的token产生冗余梯度，造成三个尺度的浪费（token、训练阶段、提示词），而现有方法采用统一监督方式，未考虑这种能力依赖的退化。

Method: 提出SEAD方法，使用熵作为统一探针在三个尺度上解决退化问题：(1) 师生联合熵将token分区，应用不同散度或零梯度（约50%跳过）；(2) 余弦调度从前向KL退火到反向KL；(3) 基于能力的课程引入由易到难的提示词。三个组件共生且必要。

Result: 在OLMo-3（7B到32B）上，SEAD在六个数学基准上比普通OPD平均提升4.8%准确率，消融实验证实了超加性交互效应。

Conclusion: SEAD通过熵引导的多尺度自适应蒸馏策略，有效解决了OPD中依赖学生能力的监督退化问题，三个组件协同作用产生超加性收益。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has a property absent in offline distillation and RL: teacher supervision quality depends on student competence. Incoherent rollouts yield noisy gradients; already-mastered tokens yield redundant ones. This creates waste at three scales (tokens, training phases, and prompts) yet existing methods supervise uniformly. We introduce SEAD, which uses entropy as a unified probe of this competence-dependent degradation at three scales: (1) joint teacher-student entropy partitions tokens into zones receiving tailored divergences or zero gradient (approx. 50% skipped); (2) a cosine schedule anneals from forward to reverse KL as competence grows; (3) a competence-gated curriculum introduces prompts easy-to-hard. These components are symbiotically necessary: token selection requires coherent rollouts (curriculum), annealing requires monotonic improvement (also curriculum). On OLMo-3 (7B to 32B), SEAD achieves +4.8 avg accuracy over vanilla OPD across six math benchmarks, with ablations confirming super-additive interactions.

</details>


### [251] [Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28574)
*Manuel Pita*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出"粒度校准"方法，通过将构念分解为从句级组件并用理论推导规则组合，解决LLM编码中构念效度被忽视的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM编码仅关注与人类标注者的可靠性（信度），却忽略了构念效度——模型可能通过相关性达到编码结果，但并未真正测量到理论所定义的构念，且缺乏区分真实测量与虚假相关的方法。

Method: 粒度校准方法将构念分解为从句级组件，用抽取式证据逐一测试文本，再通过显式的、理论推导的规则组合结果。规则是明确陈述的而非隐含在一次黑箱处理中，其结构本身就是关于编码过程的证据。

Result: 该方法能展示哪些组件决定了编码结果；当编码错误时，能区分是遗漏了某组件还是混淆了相邻构念。

Conclusion: 验证方式应从将工具输出与标注者评分对比，转向证明该工具运行的是理论所规定的构念。

Abstract: When a large language model (LLM) codes a construct in text as a human annotator would, that agreement makes the LLM a reliable coder. Yet reliability leaves construct validity untouched. The instrument may be theory-naive, reaching the code through a correlate that meets none of the demands the construct's theory makes, and no current method tells that apart from genuine measurement. We propose grain calibration as a method that closes the gap. It decomposes a construct into clause-level components, tests each against the text with extractive evidence, and combines the results through an explicit, theory-derived rule. Because the rule is stated rather than lodged in one opaque pass, its structure is evidence about the process rather than the output. It shows which components settled a code, and, when the code is wrong, whether a component was missed or an adjacent construct mistaken for it. Validation shifts from scoring an instrument's outputs against an annotator to showing that the instrument runs on the construct its theory specifies.

</details>


### [252] [Phonological Perception of Sign Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28667)
*Kayo Yin,Jessica Carter,Alex Xijie Lu,Annemarie Kocab*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究评估了手语识别（SLR）模型对美国手语（ASL）音系特征的感知能力，发现模型虽具备一定的音系敏感性，但存在明显的架构权衡：基于姿态的模型对手形对比敏感，基于像素的模型更擅长捕捉位置变化，且姿态模型能部分对齐人类感知判断（r≈0.49）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管深度学习在手语识别任务上取得了翻译性能的提升，但这些模型是否真正区分抽象的语音学特征（如手形、位置、运动），还是仅依赖低层统计相关性，尚不清楚。

Method: 通过最小对比对测试SLR模型的音系敏感性，并评估模型表征与人类行为数据的对齐程度。

Result: SLR模型表现出涌现的音系敏感性，但存在架构权衡：姿态模型对手形敏感，像素模型对位置敏感；姿态模型学到的潜在表征与人类感知相似性判断相关（r≈0.49）。

Conclusion: SLR模型具备涌现音系能力，但当前训练范式无法超越其架构归纳偏差，限制了进一步发展。

Abstract: Sign languages are compositional systems where meaning arises by combining sublexical phonological parameters, such as handshape, location, and movement. While deep learning models for Sign Language Recognition (SLR) have achieved increased performance on translation benchmarks, it remains unclear whether these models distinguish abstract phonological features or merely rely on low-level statistical correlations. This work evaluates the phonological perception of SLR models trained on American Sign Language (ASL) by probing phonological sensitivity using minimal pairs and evaluating representational alignment with human behavioral data. Our results reveal that SLR models exhibit emergent phonological sensitivity, but with clear architectural trade-offs: pose-based models are sensitive to handshape contrasts, while pixel-based models better capture location changes. Furthermore, pose-based models learn latent representations that correlate with human perceptual similarity judgments (r~0.49). These findings suggest that while SLR models exhibit emergent phonology, current training paradigms are insufficient to scale them beyond their architectural inductive biases.

</details>


### [253] [AnTenA: Actionable and Explainable Tensor Analysis System with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28708)
*Dawon Ahn,Auder Der,Evangelos E. Papalexakis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AnTenA方法，利用大语言模型（LLMs）解释从张量分解中提取的共聚类潜在模式，无需依赖标签或辅助元数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法依赖标签或辅助元数据来解释多维度数据中的隐藏模式，但这些数据可能存在不准确、不足或不可用的问题。

Method: AnTenA利用大语言模型（LLMs）的知识，通过任务无关和任务特定的提示，解释从张量分解中提取的共聚类潜在模式。

Result: 通过前向和后向推理任务测试LLMs的解释效果，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: AnTenA能够在不依赖标签或辅助数据的情况下，有效利用LLMs解释多维度数据中的隐藏模式。

Abstract: Accurately explaining hidden patterns in multi-aspect data has typically been done by leveraging labels and/or accompanying auxiliary metadata. However, labels and auxiliary data may be inaccurate (e.g. nonstandard, inconsistent), insufficient (e.g. static tabular metadata for time-dependent recordings), or unavailable. %
We propose \fullmethod (\method), which leverages the knowledge of large language models (LLMs) to explain the hidden patterns in human narratives. \method uses task-agnostic and task-specific prompts to explain extracted co-clustered latent patterns from tensor decomposition. To evaluate these explanations, we test the LLMs on forward and backward inference tasks. % Our demo system is available at https://github.com/dawonahn/ECML_PKDD_AnTenA.

</details>


### [254] [SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28715)
*My Chiffon Nguyen,Aulia Adila,Saksorn Ruangtanusak,Kittiphat Leesombatwathana,Vissuta Gunawan Lim,Patomporn Payoungkhamdee,Samuel Cahyawijaya*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SEATauBench 是首个针对东南亚主权AI的智能体评估框架，通过对TauBench进行五语言适配，发现英语智能体能力在仅改变对话语言时迁移尚可，但随任务上下文本地化程度加深，质量和鲁棒性急剧下降，揭示了纯英语评估的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 东南亚地区AI开发与评估发展迅速，但智能体在区域语言中的能力仍未被充分理解，而这对于主权AI至关重要，因此需要填补这一评估空白。

Method: 将TauBench适配至五种东南亚语言（普通话、越南语、泰语、印尼语、菲律宾语），设计渐进式本地化设置，改变用户-智能体交互语言、工具规范语言和任务领域语言，评估智能体在不同本地化程度下的表现。

Result: 英语智能体能力在仅改变对话语言时迁移较好，但随着任务上下文（工具规范、任务领域）本地化程度加深，质量和鲁棒性显著下降，完全本地化适配时损失最大。

Conclusion: SEATauBench作为诊断基准和可复用的适配管道，有助于构建可靠的 multilingual 智能体；纯英语评估不足以衡量智能体在东南亚语言中的实际能力。

Abstract: While AI development and evaluation for Southeast Asia (SEA) has grown rapidly, agent capabilities in regional languages are still poorly understood despite its importance to sovereign AI. To fill this gap, we introduce SEATauBench, the first agent-focused evaluation framework for SEA sovereign AI. SeaTau adapts TauBench to five languages -- Mandarin, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, and Filipino -- and evaluates agents across progressively localized settings that vary the language of user-agent interaction, tool specifications, and task domains. Across three recent models, we find that English agent capabilities transfer reasonably well when only the conversation language changes, but quality and robustness degrade sharply as more task contexts are localized, with the largest losses in full domain adaptation. We also the limits of English-only agent assessment for measuring agent capabilities in SEA languages. More broadly, SeaTau provides a diagnostic benchmark and reusable adaptation pipeline for building reliable multilingual agents for linguistically diverse regions. Data and code can be accessed at github.com/SEACrowd/SEATauBench.

</details>


### [255] [DriftGuard: Safety-Aware Multi-Monitor Detection and Selective Adaptation for Evolving Toxicity Moderation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28725)
*Yuting Xin,Hanyu Cai,Binqi Shen,Lier Jin,Lan Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DriftGuard框架，通过多监视器安全感知漂移检测与硬混合适应性模型更新，提升在线毒性内容审核中针对演化有害行为的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有漂移检测方法多关注全局分布变化，忽略了局部有害子空间或高风险模型错误区域中出现的与安全相关的偏移，导致毒性审核系统难以应对编码语言、目标转移等演化有害行为。

Method: DriftGuard包含全局文本漂移、身份危害漂移、模型不确定性、毒性风险漂移和假阴性风险漂移五个监视器；检测到安全相关变化后，通过硬混合适应集优先选择假阴性、身份相关高风险、假阳性风险和不确定边界样本进行模型更新。

Result: 在Civil Comments时间偏移和Jigsaw-to-DynaHate跨数据集偏移实验中，安全感知监视器能检测到全局漂移遗漏的风险；硬混合适应将Civil Comments毒性召回提升至0.8777，DynaHate毒性召回从0.7107提升至0.8523；Bootstrap分析显示DynaHate毒性召回提升0.1418，假阴性率降低0.0781。

Conclusion: DriftGuard通过将安全感知漂移检测与轻量级模型更新相结合，为更鲁棒的适应性毒性审核提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Automated toxicity moderation systems operate in dynamic online environments where harmful behavior evolves through coded language, shifting targets, and strategic adaptation to enforcement. Existing drift detection methods often focus on global distributional change, but such signals may miss safety-relevant shifts that emerge in localized harm subspaces or high-risk model-error regions. This paper introduces DriftGuard, a safety-aware adaptive moderation framework that combines multi-monitor drift detection with selective model updating. The framework tracks global text drift, identity-harm drift, model uncertainty, toxic-risk drift, and false-negative-risk drift. When safety-relevant change is detected, the model is updated using a hard-mix adaptation set that prioritizes likely false negatives, identity-related high-risk examples, false-positive-risk examples, and uncertain boundary cases. Experiments on Civil Comments temporal shift and Jigsaw-to-DynaHate cross-dataset shift show that safety-aware monitors detect risks missed by global drift alone. Hard-mix adaptation improves toxic recall and accuracy over no-update and random-balanced baselines, raising toxic recall to 0.8777 on Civil Comments and from 0.7107 to 0.8523 on DynaHate. Bootstrap analysis further shows stable DynaHate safety gains, with toxic recall increasing by 0.1418 and false-negative prevalence decreasing by 0.0781. Overall, DriftGuard links safety-aware drift detection to targeted, lightweight model updating for more robust adaptive toxicity moderation.

</details>


### [256] [5ting at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Strong End-to-End Multi-Turn RAG via LLM-Based Reranking and Faithfulness Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28737)
*Thien-Qua-T-Nguyen,Chi Hoang,Nguyen Tran,Tri Le,Khanh Truong,Chinh Trong Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了5ting系统，用于SemEval2026 Task 8的多轮RAG评估，结合BGE-M3稠密检索、FAISS索引、双查询合并检索和LLM重排序，在任务A和C上取得了有竞争力的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多轮RAG面临上下文漂移、查询不明确和幻觉风险等问题，现有系统难以有效应对这些挑战，因此需要设计专门的系统来提升多轮对话中的检索和生成质量。

Method: 采用BGE-M3稠密检索与FAISS索引进行高效检索，设计双查询合并检索策略（融合当前查询与历史上下文），结合LLM重排序优化结果，最终使用角色分离的生成策略，仅基于检索到的证据进行回答。

Result: 检索任务A上nDCG@5=0.4719，端到端任务C上调和得分为0.5597，RL_F=0.7692。

Conclusion: 提出的5ting系统在多轮RAG场景下表现良好，验证了双查询合并检索和角色分离生成策略的有效性。

Abstract: We introduce 5ting, our system for the SemEval2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), which evaluates multi-turn Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Multi turn RAG involves context drift, under specification, and hallucination risk. Our system combines BGE-M3 dense retrieval with FAISS indexing, dual-query merged retrieval, and LLM based reranking, followed by role separated generation constrained to retrieved evidence. The retriever achieved nDCG@5 = 0.4719 in Task A, while the end to end system ranked in Task C with a harmonic score of 0.5597 and RL_F = 0.7692.

</details>


### [257] [Majority Vote Silences Minority Values: Annotator Disagreement at the Hate/Offensive Boundary in HateXplain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28772)
*Joshua Muhumuza,Joab Ezra Agaba,Mercy Amiyo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究揭示仇恨言论标注中的多数投票聚合导致42.6%的标注分歧集中在仇恨/冒犯边界，模型在分歧数据上准确率下降22-28个百分点，且标准评估指标无法检测这种失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仇恨言论标注流程通常将标注者分歧通过多数投票简化为单一标签，但作者质疑这种聚合方式并非中立，可能掩盖标注边界问题的本质。

Method: 使用HateXplain数据集，对比硬标签BERT模型(A)、软标签模型(B)和每标注者多头模型(C)在一致标注和分歧标注数据上的表现，并测试三种后处理干预措施。

Result: 分歧数据上所有模型准确率大幅下降；模型A在边界错误上表现出虚假高置信度；三种下游干预均无法恢复边界准确率。

Conclusion: 问题根源在于标注设计的上游结构缺陷——多数投票将争议性判断呈现为"真实答案"，模型继承了这种虚假确定性，干预必须发生在标注流程设计阶段。

Abstract: Hate speech annotation pipelines routinely collapse annotator disagreement into majority vote labels before training. We show that this aggregation is not neutral: 42.6% of all annotator disagreement in HateXplain concentrates specifically at the hate/offensive boundary, a pattern consistent with annotators applying different thresholds for where hate begins (chi-squared = 135.199, df = 2, p < 0.0001). Both a hard-label BERT model (Model A) and a soft-label model (Model B) drop 22 percentage points in accuracy from agreed posts (~80%) to disagreement posts (~58%), confirmed at p < 0.0001. A per-annotator multi-head model (Model C) widens this gap further to 28 points while collapsing offensive disagreement accuracy to 0.245. Critically, Model A expresses significantly higher confidence on boundary case errors than Model C (0.710 vs. 0.495, p < 0.0001), meaning standard evaluation metrics will not detect the failure. Three downstream interventions of increasing sophistication all fail to recover boundary accuracy. We argue the problem is structural. Majority vote presents a contested judgment as ground truth, and models inherit that false certainty. The intervention must be upstream in annotation design.

</details>


### [258] [Hybrid Retriever Evolution for Multimodal Document Reasoning Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29648)
*Bohan Yao,Shruthan Radhakrishna,Vikas Yadav*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种失败驱动的进化框架，让元智能体自主学习如何协调多种检索器（词汇、语义、多模态），将检索从固定流水线转变为自适应推理决策，在文档理解任务上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态文档理解系统使用固定检索流水线，无法适应不同推理步骤的多样化需求，检索与推理之间缺乏自适应协调机制。

Method: 提出失败驱动的进化框架：元智能体分析错误推理轨迹，主动探测工具环境诊断根因，迭代重写任务智能体的指令，使其学会何时调用何种检索器、如何组合跨模态跨页面的证据。

Result: 在MMLongBench-Doc和DocBench上，进化后的智能体相比基线提升高达+19.6分，持续优于MACT、MDocAgent、SimpleDoc等近期系统。

Conclusion: 自主多智能体协调是实现多模态文档推理的有前景范式，进化过程展示从单一词汇行为向丰富多工具协调的渐进转变。

Abstract: Different retrievers, including lexical, semantic, and multimodal approaches, provide highly complementary strengths for multimodal document understanding, yet most systems combine them through fixed pipelines that cannot adapt to the demands of individual reasoning steps. In this work, we ask whether retrieval orchestration itself can be learned as part of the reasoning process. We introduce a failure-driven evolution framework in which a meta-agent autonomously discovers how a tool-using task agent should coordinate diverse retrievers during multi-step document question answering. The meta-agent analyzes incorrect reasoning trajectories, actively probes the same tool environment to diagnose root causes, and iteratively rewrites the task agent's instructions, turning retrieval from a fixed front-end stage into an adaptive, step-wise reasoning decision. The evolved agent learns when to invoke each retriever, how to combine them, and how to compose evidence across modalities and pages. On MMLongBench-Doc and DocBench, the evolved agent achieves gains of up to +19.6 points over the unevolved baseline and consistently outperforms recent systems including MACT, MDocAgent, and SimpleDoc. Detailed retrieval analyses confirm that these improvements arise from adaptive routing and evidence composition rather than reliance on any hard coded retrieval mode, and evolution dynamics reveal a progressive shift from narrow lexical behavior to rich multi-tool coordination. These findings establish autonomous multi-agent coordination as a promising paradigm for multimodal document reasoning.

</details>


### [259] [Structure-Preserving Document Translation via Multi-Stage LLM Pipeline: A Case Study in Marathi](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28796)
*Manasi Waghe,Danish Chandargi,Mohammad Aamir Rayyan,Raviraj Joshi,A. R. Deshpande*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一个能够保持文档结构的马拉地语至英语政府文件翻译框架，集成布局感知OCR、坐标文本提取、LLM翻译和HTML重建，在真实政府PDF上相比传统文本翻译管线在结构保留、翻译连贯性和术语一致性上表现更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度政府文件主要以马拉地语等地区语言发布，给非母语读者、跨州行政机构和政策分析师带来访问障碍，现有神经机器翻译系统忽略文档结构、格式完整性和领域专业术语。

Method: 集成布局感知OCR、基于坐标的文本提取、大语言模型翻译、通过HTML表示的结构化文档重建，强制空间对齐约束并保留层级文档元素。

Result: 在真实马拉地语政府PDF上的实验评估表明，相比传统纯文本翻译管线，该框架在结构保留、翻译连贯性和术语一致性上均有提升。

Conclusion: 该框架为电子政务和行政文档处理的可扩展多语言可访问性解决方案做出了贡献。

Abstract: Government documents in India are predominantly issued in regional languages such as Marathi, creating substantial accessibility barriers for non-native readers, interstate administrative bodies, and policy analysts. Although recent advances in neural machine translation have improved sentence-level translation quality, existing systems largely neglect document structure, formatting integrity, and domain-specific terminology, thereby limiting their applicability to official documentation. This paper presents a structure-preserving Marathi-to-English government document translation framework capable of performing end-to-end document transformation while maintaining layout fidelity. The proposed system integrates layout-aware optical character recognition, coordinate-based text extraction, large language model based translation, and structured document reconstruction through HTML representations. By enforcing spatial alignment constraints and preserving hierarchical document elements, the framework ensures structural consistency between the source and translated documents. Experimental evaluation on real-world Marathi government PDFs demonstrates improved structural preservation, translation coherence, and terminological consistency compared to conventional text-only translation pipelines. The proposed framework contributes toward scalable multilingual accessibility solutions for e-governance and administrative document processing.

</details>


### [260] [Labeling Training Data for Entity Matching Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28823)
*Aaron Steiner,Christian Bizer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用知识蒸馏工作流（LLM作为教师模型为学生模型标注训练数据）来避免实体匹配中需要人工标注任务特定训练数据的问题，实验表明学生模型性能与基准训练集训练的模型相当（F1差异<2点），且成本仅为$28-$41美元，而人工标注需470小时，推理速度提升41.5-534倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在实体匹配中表现优异但推理慢且成本高，而传统方法或小语言模型推理快但需要任务特定的训练数据，因此探索能否通过知识蒸馏避免人工标注训练数据的需求。

Method: 采用知识蒸馏工作流，LLM作为教师模型为未标注的候选对生成标签，然后用这些机器标注的数据训练较小的学生模型；研究了配对选择策略、教师模型、标签后处理方法和学生模型等多个维度。

Result: 学生模型在机器标注数据上训练与在基准训练集上训练性能相当（F1差异低于2点）；使用GPT-5.2标注五个基准数据集的成本为$28.31-$40.88，而人工标注需470小时；Ditto推理速度比直接使用LLM快41.5-534倍。

Conclusion: 当前LLM结合合适的配对选择方法可以大幅减少甚至消除实体匹配中人工标注任务特定训练数据的需求。

Abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance on entity matching without requiring task-specific training data. However, applying these models to large sets of candidate pairs remains slow and costly. In contrast, entity matchers using traditional machine learning methods or small language models (SLMs), such as RoBERTa, offer much faster inference but require task-specific training data.
  This paper investigates whether the need to provide task-specific training data can be avoided by using knowledge-distillation workflows, in which an LLM serves as a teacher model to label training pairs that are subsequently used to train a smaller student model. We investigate knowledge distillation for entity matching along the following dimensions: pair-selection strategy, teacher model, label post-processing method, and student model. We evaluate the workflows using the Abt-Buy, Walmart-Amazon, WDC Products, DBLP-ACM, and DBLP-Scholar benchmarks, and compare the performance of student models trained with machine-labeled data to the performance of the same models trained using the benchmark training sets.
  Our experiments show that student models trained using the machine-labeled sets perform approximately on par with models trained on the benchmark training sets, with the remaining differences in both directions staying below two F1 points.
