Abstract: Benchmarks are widely used to evaluate task completion by Large Language Models (LLMs), but this approach has accumulated construction-validity problems, and a passing score may not show whether the requested task was delivered. We study both problems. In a controlled code-as-spec setup, two production Copilot CLI agents (claude-opus-4.7, gpt-5.5) re-implement a React Fluent-UI data table in Angular as a reusable library under a hidden 222-test Playwright oracle across 18 runs and three oracle-availability conditions. Alongside the score, we run a mechanical library audit and check each verdict with a no-op ablation. Without the oracle, the library is present but unfinished, revealed by scores. With the oracle in the loop, the score reaches near-perfect, but from a demo holding the tested behavior directly, the library left dead or absent. We call this building to the test; the broader disposition behind both we call validation self-awareness. The agent does not, on its own, validate what it ships as a user would. Prevalence remains an open question across other agents, signals, and model families. Beyond benchmark scores, dispositions like validation self-awareness merit research attention.

</details>


### [408] [SWE-MeM: Learning Adaptive Memory Management for Long-Horizon Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28434)
*Shuzheng Gao,Wenhao Zeng,Zhaojian Yu,Jianqiao Wangni,Chaozheng Wang,Kai Cai,Shilin He,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-MeM是一个训练框架，让软件工程智能体能够主动、按需地管理内存。它通过灵活的内存工具和Memory-aware GRPO训练，在SWE-Bench Verified上分别用4B和30B模型实现了43.4%和60.2%的解决率，在性能和效率上均优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有内存管理方法依赖静态压缩或对压缩时机和粒度施加刚性约束，无法联合优化内存管理与问题解决能力来提升性能并减少token消耗。

Method: 提出SWE-MeM框架：（1）提供灵活的内存工具，让智能体根据轨迹状态、任务进度和剩余上下文预算自主决定何时、压缩什么以及如何压缩；（2）合成主动内存管理轨迹进行训练；（3）提出Memory-aware GRPO，通过内存感知轨迹拆分和步骤级信用分配联合优化内存管理与问题解决。

Result: 在SWE-Bench Verified上，SWE-MeM（4B模型）达到43.4%的解决率，SWE-MeM（30B模型）达到60.2%的解决率，在性能与效率上均优于现有内存管理基线。

Conclusion: SWE-MeM通过让智能体自主决定内存管理策略并联合优化解决问题能力，有效提升了长程软件工程任务中的性能与token效率。

Abstract: Long-horizon software engineering agents often need to manage lengthy and noisy interaction histories under limited context budgets. Existing memory management methods typically rely on static compression workflows or impose rigid constraints on compression timing and granularity. Moreover, these approaches fail to jointly optimize memory management and issue resolution capabilities to improve performance while reducing token usage. We present SWE-MeM, a training framework for proactive and on-demand memory management in software engineering agents. SWE-MeM provides a flexible memory tool that lets agents decide when, what, and how to compress based on trajectory state, task progress, and remaining context budget. We train agents with synthesized proactive memory-management trajectories and Memory-aware GRPO, which jointly optimizes memory management and issue resolution through memory-aware trajectory splitting and step-level credit assignment. On SWE-Bench Verified, SWE-MeM achieves 43.4% and 60.2% resolve rate with 4B and 30B models, respectively, outperforming existing memory management baselines in both performance and efficiency.

</details>


### [409] [Dockerless: Environment-Free Program Verifier for Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28436)
*Wenhao Zeng,Yuling Shi,Xiaodong Gu,Chao Hu,Chaofan Wang,Yuhao Cui,Hongting Zhou,Mengnan Qi,Jianqiao Wangni,Zhaojian Yu,Shuzheng Gao,Kai Cai,Shilin He*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Dockerless，一种无需执行代码的无环境补丁验证器，通过智能体仓库探索判断补丁正确性，在多个基准上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于执行验证的程序验证器需要运行单元测试，依赖Docker等环境，环境搭建成本高，限制了训练效率与可扩展性。

Method: Dockerless是一种无环境智能体补丁验证器，不执行代码，而是通过智能体在代码仓库中探索收集证据来判断补丁正确性。

Result: 在验证器评估基准上比最强开源验证器高出14.3 AUC点；作为SFT轨迹过滤器和RL奖励时，在SWE-bench Verified/Multilingual/Pro上分别达到62.0%、50.0%、35.2%的解决率，超越基线2.4、8.7、2.9个点。

Conclusion: Dockerless实现了完全无环境的后训练流程，性能与基于环境的后训练相当，大幅降低了环境搭建成本。

Abstract: Program verifiers play a central role in training coding agents, including selecting trajectories for supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and providing rewards for reinforcement learning (RL). Standard execution-based verification requires running unit tests inside per-repository environments such as Docker images, incurring substantial environment setup costs. We propose Dockerless, an environment-free agentic patch verifier that evaluates generated code patches without executing them. Rather than simply matching candidate patches to references, Dockerless judges patch correctness using evidence gathered through agentic repository exploration. On a verifier evaluation benchmark, Dockerless outperforms the strongest open-source verifier by 14.3 AUC points. Using Dockerless as both the SFT trajectory filter and the RL reward enables a fully environment-free post-training pipeline. The resulting model reaches 62.0%, 50.0%, and 35.2% resolve rate on SWE-bench Verified, Multilingual, and Pro, respectively. It surpasses the Qwen3.5-9B baseline by 2.4, 8.7, and 2.9 points, matching environment-based post-training.

</details>


### [410] [When AI Reviews Its Own Code: Recursive Self-Training Collapse in Code LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28438)
*Xinyuan Song,Zekun Cai,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究代码大语言模型在递归自训练中，使用AI自生成的代码作为训练数据会导致模型性能退化。对比无审查、人类门控审查（编译/静态检查）和AI自门控审查三种模式，发现无审查退化最快，人类门控仅减缓退化，而AI自门控初期有效但后期会进入"橡皮图章"模式（评分上升但正确性下降），证明稳定训练需要外部验证而非模型自身审查。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在代码LLM中，AI生成代码可能进入真实代码仓库，随后成为训练数据，形成仓库级的自训练循环。传统软件开发通过PR审查、测试、编译和人工审批中断这一循环，但AI编码工具生成代码速度远超人工审查速度，且代码审查本身日益被AI系统自动化，亟需研究这一风险。

Method: 比较三种递归微调机制：无审查、人类门控审查（编译+静态质量检查）、AI自门控审查（使用代码LLM自身的困惑度和二元自我评分）。通过数学建模将审查形式化为门控分布重加权，证明AI自门控在自确认接受条件下退化为无门控自训练，并进行表征级协方差浓度的谱分析。

Result: 无审查模式下退化最快；人类门控过滤可减缓但无法阻止退化；AI自门控过滤早期表现良好但后期失去过滤效果，二元自门控进入"橡皮图章"模式（接受分数上升而基准正确性下降）。

Conclusion: 稳定递归代码LLM训练需要外生验证而非模型耦合的自我审查。

Abstract: Recursive self-training can degrade neural generative models when generated data is reused without fresh human data or external quality control. We study this risk in code LLMs, where AI-generated code can enter real repositories, later become training data, and create a repository-scale self-training loop. While software development traditionally interrupts this loop through pull-request review, tests, compilation, and human approval, AI coding tools now produce code faster than humans can review it, and code review itself is increasingly automated by AI systems. We therefore compare three recursive fine-tuning regimes: no review, Human-gate review using model-independent filters such as compilation and static quality checks, and AI-self-gate review using the code LLM's own signals such as perplexity and binary self-scoring. Across multiple code LLMs and benchmarks, no review collapses fastest, Human-gate filters slow but do not stop collapse, and AI-self-gate filters can look strong early but later lose their filtering effect. In the clearest case, the binary self-gate enters a rubber-stamp regime where acceptance scores rise while benchmark correctness falls. We explain this behavior by formulating review as gated distributional reweighting, proving that AI self-gating degenerates to ungated self-training under a self-confirming acceptance condition, and giving a spectral analysis of representation-level covariance concentration under recursive retraining. These results suggest that stable recursive code LLM training requires exogenous verification rather than model-coupled self-review.

</details>


### [411] [TUA-Bench: A Benchmark for General-Purpose Terminal-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28480)
*Shoufa Chen,Luyuan Wang,Xuan Yang,Zhiheng Liu,Yuren Cong,Yuanfeng Ji,Feiyan Zhou,Xiaohui Zhang,Fanny Yang,Belinda Zeng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: TUA-Bench是一个包含120个真实世界任务的通用终端代理基准测试，涵盖文档编辑、邮件管理、实时网页信息查找等常规数字活动，以及需要专业软件的科学与工程工作流。最强前沿代理Claude Code with Claude Opus 4.8 max reasoning effort仅达到65.8%的整体性能，表明终端通用代理仍有很大提升空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试要么针对图形用户界面(GUI)，要么侧重基于终端的编程工作流，缺乏对通用终端代理在更广泛计算机使用任务上的评估能力。

Method: 构建了包含120个真实世界任务的TUA-Bench基准测试，涵盖5个任务族（文档编辑、邮件管理、实时网页信息查找、科学与工程工作流），每个任务手动设计、在真实终端中运行并配备确定性设置脚本，采用基于执行的评分协议进行评估。

Result: 最强前沿代理Claude Code with Claude Opus 4.8 max reasoning effort在TUA-Bench上达到65.8%的整体性能。

Conclusion: TUA-Bench旨在通过提供广泛且真实的终端使用能力评估，加速从狭窄、特定任务的助手向能够在多样化数字环境中可靠运行的通用代理的转变。

Abstract: As large language models and harness frameworks continue to advance, agents operating in terminals are increasingly capable of performing a broader range of general computer-use tasks beyond coding. However, existing benchmarks do not adequately evaluate general-purpose terminal computer-use agents (TUAs): general computer-use benchmarks primarily target graphical user interfaces (GUIs), whereas terminal-based benchmarks largely emphasize technical and programming-centric workflows historically native to the shell. We introduce TUA-Bench, a general-purpose benchmark for terminal-use agents. TUA-Bench includes 120 real-world tasks across five task families, covering routine digital activities-including document editing, email management, and live-web information seeking-as well as scientific and engineering workflows co-designed with PhD-level domain experts that require specialized software. This breadth distinguishes TUA-Bench from prior shell-focused or domain-specific benchmarks. Each task is manually designed, runs in a real terminal with a deterministic setup script, and is evaluated by an execution-based scoring protocol. We find that the strongest frontier agent, Claude Code with Claude Opus 4.8 max reasoning effort, achieves 65.8% overall performance, with substantial gaps across both tracks. By providing a broad and realistic evaluation of terminal-use capabilities, TUA-Bench aims to accelerate the transition from narrow, task-specific assistants to general-purpose agents capable of operating reliably across diverse digital environments.

</details>


### [412] [Evaluating LLMs on Java Code Snippet Adaptation Using a Mutation-Injection Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28618)
*Ali Aman,Muhammad Asaduzzaman,Shaowei Wang,Chanchal K. Roy*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需指令的代码片段适配评估方法，通过构建Java代码片段数据集和变异注入框架，系统研究LLM在不同适配类型、复杂度和上下文粒度下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试要么依赖显式步骤指令，要么覆盖的变更类型狭窄（如仅变量连接），或仅在函数级别操作，缺乏对LLM在无明确编辑指导下进行多种代码适配能力的评估。

Method: 从开源仓库中构建具有强测试覆盖的Java代码片段数据集，采用基于开发者代码适配实证研究的适配操作符分类体系，通过变异注入框架控制变更。在片段级别工作，使用未变异片段作为合理参考，在三种上下文粒度级别评估LLM的无指令适配能力，正确性通过测试套件重插入和变异级别检查来衡量。

Result: 论文尚在方法设计阶段，尚未报告具体实验结果，但提出了三个待回答的研究问题：哪些适配类型最难（RQ1）、性能如何随适配复杂度变化（RQ2）、模型需要多少上下文（RQ3）。

Conclusion: 该研究有望填补现有基准在无指令代码片段适配评估方面的空白，通过精细控制的变异注入和多种上下文粒度评估，系统揭示LLM在代码适配任务中的能力边界和局限性。

Abstract: Background: Developers frequently reuse code by copying fragments and adapting them to fit new contexts. Existing benchmarks for evaluating large language models (LLMs) on code adaptation either rely on explicit step-by-step instructions, cover only narrow change types such as variable wiring, or operate exclusively at function-level granularity. It remains unknown how well LLMs can adapt code fragments without explicit edit guidance when the required changes are varied and controlled.
  Objective: We investigate instruction-free code snippet adaptation in which an LLM must adapt a code fragment to fit its target context without any explicit edit guidance. We study three dimensions: which adaptation types are hardest (RQ1), how performance scales with adaptation complexity (RQ2), and how much surrounding context the model needs (RQ3).
  Method: We will construct a dataset of Java code fragments from open-source repositories with strong test coverage and apply a taxonomy of adaptation operators, derived from empirical findings on how developers adapt copied code, using a mutation-injection framework. Working at the code fragment level and controlling the injected changes lets us know exactly what adaptations the model must perform. The unmutated fragment serves as a plausible reference for the changes the model needs to make. LLMs will be evaluated on instruction-free adaptation tasks across three context granularity levels. Correctness will be measured primarily via test-suite re-insertion, complemented by mutation-level inspection.

</details>


### [413] [From Determinism to Delegation: AI-Native Software Engineering and the Evolution of the Agentic Engineer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28791)
*Mamdouh Alenezi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文论证AI原生软件工程是一场范式转变，催生了以代理系统为核心产物的“Agentic Engineer”新职业原型，并分析了从确定性编程向概率性自主行为监督转变的三个关键变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型支持持续、多步骤、工具中介的执行，工程价值正从编写确定性代码转向监督概率性和自主性行为，需要重新定义软件工程的角色与方法。

Method: 通过三个关键转变（工作单元、正确性标准、问责模式）对比传统工程与代理工程，结合2022年后研究分析自主代理核心机制，并基于社会技术框架和治理框架审视人机协作证据与风险。

Result: 生产率提升证据不一，有研究显示经验丰富的开发者反而出现效率下降，表明纪律性监督而非自动化才是关键能力；同时识别了间接提示注入等风险。

Conclusion: 未来是共生而非替代：代理工程建立在经典软件工程原则之上并依赖之。

Abstract: Software engineering is experiencing its most significant transformation since the emergence of high-level programming languages. As large language models (LLMs) increasingly enable sustained, multi-step, tool-mediated execution, engineering value is shifting from writing deterministic code to supervising probabilistic and autonomous behavior. This paper argues that AI-Native Software Engineering is a paradigm shift rather than a mere tooling advance, creating a new professional archetype: the Agentic Engineer, whose primary artifact is the agentic system rather than the program.
  We characterize this transition through three changes: (i) the unit of work shifts from functions to supervised agent workflows, (ii) correctness shifts from binary assertions to statistical evaluation under uncertainty, and (iii) accountability shifts from code authorship to outcome ownership. Drawing on post-2022 research, we compare traditional and agentic engineering roles and define core mechanisms of autonomous agents, including reasoning-acting loops, context engineering, tool use, memory, behavioral drift, and compositional error.
  We place human-AI collaboration within socio-technical frameworks and examine mixed empirical evidence. While some studies report productivity gains, others show slowdowns among experienced developers, highlighting disciplined oversight rather than automation as the critical competency. Using established governance frameworks, we identify required skills and risks, including indirect prompt injection. We conclude that the future is one of symbiosis rather than substitution: agentic engineering builds upon and depends on classical software engineering principles.

</details>


### [414] [Reward-Free Code Alignment from Pretrained or Fine-Tuned LLM: Unpacking the Trade-offs for Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28998)
*Gias Uddin,Sanjeepan Sivapiran*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过实证研究，探究了两种对齐技术（DPO和BoNBoN）在代码LLM上的效果，发现在预训练模型上进行对齐能带来更大的性能提升，而在指令微调后的模型上进行对齐改进有限甚至可能下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前LLM对齐技术主要针对非编码任务，对于编码任务中是否能同时满足功能需求（生成可执行代码）和非功能需求（可读性、风格、可维护性）尚不清楚，且代码LLM对齐应基于预训练版本还是微调版本也不明确。

Method: 使用五种SOTA LLM，采用DPO和BoNBoN两种对齐技术，利用SelfCodeAlign构建偏好对，分别在预训练和微调两个版本上进行对齐，并通过HumanEval+、MBPP+、EvalPerf、EvoEval评估功能需求，通过CODAL评估非功能需求。

Result: 预训练到对齐的路径性能提升更大，但预训练版本本身准确率低于微调版本；微调到对齐的路径改进较小，甚至在某些情况下导致性能下降。

Conclusion: 对于代码LLM，在预训练阶段进行对齐比在微调阶段后对齐效果更显著，但需要权衡基础模型的能力。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) alignment trains an LLM using preference data to produce outputs that better meet established quality standards. While LLM alignment techniques are studied for non-coding tasks, we know little about their usefulness for coding tasks. It is unclear whether LLM code alignment could support both functional requirements (producing executable, correct code) and non-functional requirements (code readability, style, maintainability). It is also unknown whether alignment for a code LLM should begin with base pretrained version or the finetuned (i.e., instruction-tuned) version of the LLM. In this paper, we offer insights on the above two research questions by conducting an empirical study. We studied five state-of-the-art (SOTA) LLMs using two widely used LLM alignment techniques: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and BoNBoN. For each training record, we created a preference pair as accepted and rejected instances by using the SelfCodeAlign pipeline. DPO and BoNBoN are reward-free models, i.e., they eliminate the need for multiple reward scores for output preferences. We tuned each LLM using the two alignment techniques in two settings: pretrained and finetuned versions of an LLM. We evaluated functional requirements using four SOTA benchmarks (HumanEval+, MBPP+, EvalPerf, EvoEval) and non-functional requirements using the CODAL benchmark, which evaluates code quality across five dimensions derived from software engineering practices. We find that pretrained-to-aligned pathways achieve larger improvements in the aligned variant over its pretrained variant. But the pretrained variant is generally less accurate than its finetuned variant. However, finetuned- to-aligned offers smaller performance improvements or, in some cases, degradation in the aligned variant than its finetuned variant.

</details>


### [415] [Automated SysML-Based Verification of Discipline-Specific Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29006)
*Daniel Marley,Siyuan Ji*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于SysML的验证流程，能够在不同工具链中自动化验证行为、接口和参数属性，并支持可追溯性，弥补了现有方法工具特定且仅关注参数性能的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SysML验证文献存在两个缺陷：一是工具特定性导致可移植性差，二是仅关注参数化图的性能属性，忽视了行为和接口属性的验证需求。

Method: 采用混合方法（文献研究+利益相关者访谈）获取需求，结合SysML工具能力与UML测试档案，设计了端到端的自动化验证流程，并在两个独立工具链中演示验证。

Result: 成功在两种独立SysML工具链中演示了工具无关性验证，能够验证顺序、时序、基于状态的响应等行为和接口需求，而这些是纯参数方法无法实现的。

Conclusion: 该流程实现了对领域特定模型的自动化验证，支持行为和接口属性验证，且具备工具无关性和可追溯性，填补了现有SysML验证方法的空白。

Abstract: Current examples of SysML-based verification of discipline-specific models in the literature typically have two flaws. Firstly, they are developed in a tool-specific manner using proprietary APIs, limiting portability. Secondly, they focus on performance properties modelled via parametric diagrams, overlooking behavioural and interface properties that also require verification. This project addresses the problem with a verification process tailored to model-based verification, informed by common SysML tool capabilities and the UML Testing Profile, that enables automated verification of discipline\-/specific models from SysML test cases and returns the results to the SysML model for traceability. A mixed-method approach combining literature research and stakeholder interviews was used to derive validated stakeholder needs, which drove the specification and design of the process. The process was demonstrated end-to-end in two independent SysML tool-chains to evidence tool-agnosticism, and was shown to verify behavioural and interface requirements, including ordering, timing, and state-based responses, using SysML behavioural diagram constructs that parametric approaches alone cannot address.

</details>


### [416] [Diff-Based Code Corruption using LLMs for Large-Scale Bugfix Benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29088)
*Balázs Szalontai,Ábel Szauter,Balázs Márton,Péter Verebics,Balázs Pintér,Tibor Gregorics*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出MegaBugFix，一个包含12,629个Python bug的大规模基准测试，通过LLM注入真实多样的bug，发现现有模型在该基准上表现显著低于传统小规模基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有bug修复基准规模小、统计可靠性低、bug类型单一且程序相似度高，无法真实反映大语言模型在实际bug修复中的能力。

Method: 使用大语言模型对正确Python程序生成代码变更差异（diff）作为bug注入，避免LLM突变技术中产生过于简单bug或未修改程序的常见问题，构建了12,629个buggy程序的基准。

Result: 在MegaBugFix上评估了13个开源模型，所有模型在该基准上的表现均显著低于现有基线基准，表明该基准包含更具挑战性的bug。

Conclusion: MegaBugFix作为更大规模、更具代表性的bug修复基准，能暴露模型在现有基准上被隐藏的失败模式，更真实地反映模型bug修复能力。

Abstract: There are various benchmarks to evaluate bugfixing capabilities of Large Language Models. However, most widespread benchmarks do not fully reflect real-world bugfixing practices. They are small, weakening statistical reliability, and the buggy programs are often similar to one another, potentially distorting evaluation results. The range of bug types can also be narrow, failing to capture a representative range of bugs. To address these issues, we introduce MegaBugFix, a large-scale bugfixing benchmark containing 12,629 buggy Python programs synthesized from correct ones by a Large Language Model. Bug injections were generated as diffs representing code changes. Through this approach, we were able to avoid common pitfalls of LLM-based mutation techniques like injecting overly simplistic bugs or failing to modify the input program. We evaluated 13 open-weight models on MegaBugFix and baseline benchmarks, finding consistently lower performance on MegaBugFix. This reveals that our benchmark presents more challenging bugs and exposes model failures that may remain hidden when evaluating on existing benchmarks. The benchmark and fine-tuned model used for bug injection are available at hf.co/collections/szalontaib/megabugfix.

</details>


### [417] [OASIF: An Efficient Obfuscation-Aware Self-Improving Framework for LLM-Based Assembly Code Instruction Following and Comprehension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29155)
*Xinyi Wang,Rongze Chen,Ke Wang,Qiyuan Chen,Yanming Liu,Xiang Li,Chunfu Jia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出OASIF框架，通过三级训练（特征对齐、监督微调、自进化强化学习）提升LLM对抗商业级混淆二进制代码的理解能力，在VMISA-Bench上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在二进制分析中表现脆弱，尤其在面对商业级混淆（如基于虚拟机的混淆器）时性能大幅下降，需要一种能高效处理长序列混淆代码且能持续自适应的方法。

Method: OASIF包含三部分：1）token高效汇编编码器+轻量投影器，在有限上下文预算内暴露长混淆代码；2）三阶段训练：特征空间对齐、监督指令微调、在线自进化强化学习（混合奖励），实现持续自适应。

Result: 在VMISA-Bench上，Qwen2.5-Coder-Instruct-14B在Code Virtualizer、Themida、VMProtect上分别提升15.9、5.8、16.9个百分点，OASIF-Bench平均提升9.8，同时在7个BCSD基准上稳定增益，通用能力无退化。

Conclusion: OASIF能有效增强开源LLM对商业级混淆汇编代码的理解能力，且保持通用与领域相关能力，具备良好的实用性和泛化性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently shown promise in automated binary analysis, yet they remain brittle under commercial-grade obfuscation. We present OASIF, an Obfuscation-Aware Self-evolving Instruction-Following framework for obfuscated assembly comprehension. OASIF couples a token-efficient assembly encoder with a lightweight projector to expose long obfuscated code to a pretrained code LLM under a bounded context budget and follows a three-phase training: (i) feature-space alignment, (ii) supervised instruction fine-tuning, and (iii) online self-evolving reinforcement learning with hybrid rewards, enabling continual adaptation with minimal manual verification. On VMISA-Bench, a challenging out-of-distribution suite featuring three commercial VM-based obfuscators, OASIF consistently improves open-source backbones; Qwen2.5-Coder-Instruct-14B attains Success Rate gains of +15.9, +5.8, and +16.9 percentage points (pp) on Code Virtualizer, Themida (v3.0.7), and VMProtect (v3.5), respectively, and improves the OASIF-Bench average by +9.8. OASIF further delivers stable gains across seven standard BCSD benchmarks while preserving general and domain-relevant capabilities on HumanEval, VulBench, and HumanEval-Decompile.

</details>


### [418] [A Multi-Dataset Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Agents in Microservice Failure Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29193)
*Yuanhong Cai,Xiaohui Nie,Kanglin Yin,Changhua Pei,Yongqian Sun,Shenglin Zhang,Haibin Liu,Guiyang Liu,Xidao Wen,Fang Situ,Dan Pei*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出了两个大规模数据集（AIOps2025和RCA100），用于在AgentOps框架下评估基于LLM的智能体在微服务故障诊断中的推理过程，而非仅关注最终答案。评估维度包括故障定位、故障类型识别以及推理轨迹的证据 grounding。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有故障诊断基准主要面向结果导向的评估（仅评分最终答案），缺乏对系统化推理过程的评估能力，无法全面衡量智能体在多模态可观测数据下的诊断能力。

Method: 构建了两个大规模专家标注数据集（AIOps2025和RCA100），涵盖500+故障案例，覆盖资源、网络、运行时、中间件/数据库和应用逻辑五类故障场景。采用推理过程评估范式，从定位、识别和推理轨迹证据 grounding 三个维度评估智能体诊断能力。

Result: 数据集经过领域专家精细标注，并通过大规模竞赛验证（支持6000+参赛团队），可作为微服务环境中智能体故障诊断的竞赛验证基准。

Conclusion: 提出的数据集不仅提供了专家标注的诊断数据，还作为经过竞赛验证的基准，填补了现有基准在推理过程评估方面的空白，推动AgentOps中智能体故障诊断能力的发展。

Abstract: LLM-based agents are reshaping microservice operations into AgentOps, where benchmarks are key to evaluating failure diagnosis over multimodal observability data. However, existing benchmarks remain largely outcome-oriented: they score only the final answer and fail to assess the systematic reasoning process in failure diagnosis. We address this gap by introducing two large-scale datasets (AIOps2025 and RCA100) under a reasoning-process evaluation paradigm that assesses agentic diagnostic capability along three dimensions: Localization (where the fault occurs), Identification (what type of fault it is), and Reason (whether the reasoning trace is grounded in relevant evidence). Together, the two datasets comprise over 500 expert-labeled failure cases across two representative microservice systems (HipsterShop and the OpenTelemetry Demo Store). They cover diverse fault scenarios across resource, network, runtime, middleware/database, and application-logic categories and provide fine-grained causal evidence to support agent learning and reasoning-process evaluation. Beyond scale and coverage, the datasets have been carefully labelled by domain experts and validated through large-scale competitions, supporting more than 6,000 participating teams. This makes them not only expert-labeled diagnostic datasets, but also competition-validated benchmarks for evaluating agentic failure diagnosis in real-world microservice environments. Datasets are available at https://www.aiops.cn/gitlab/aiops-live-benchmark/agenticopseval.

</details>


### [419] [On the JI-RADAR: Uncovering Sustainability Tool Support for Requirements Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29439)
*Marco Stadler,Pascal Taurer,Johannes Sametinger,Wesley K. G. Assunção,Michael Riegler,Michael Vierhauser,Iris Groher*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了JI-RADAR，一个集成到Atlassian Jira平台的插件，用于帮助软件组织在需求工程过程中系统地整合可持续性报告，以应对法规要求（如UN SDGs和EU CSRD）和现有工具支持不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法规（如联合国可持续发展目标和欧盟企业可持续发展报告指令）要求软件组织将可持续性纳入业务流程，但现有的需求工程过程缺乏系统化的方法来 eliciting、分析和优先排序可持续性需求，且工具支持有限。

Method: 通过扩展广泛使用的Atlassian Jira平台，开发一个即插即用的插件JI-RADAR，为系统设计中的利益相关者（如开发者、需求工程师、项目经理等）提供实用工具，以将可持续性集成到需求工程过程中。

Result: JI-RADAR插件已实现并可直接在工业实践中采用，填补了现有工具支持的空白。

Conclusion: JI-RADAR通过无缝集成到现有工作流程中，帮助软件组织满足法规对可持续性报告的要求，提升了需求工程过程中可持续性需求的系统化管理能力。

Abstract: Context: Software-intensive systems are integral to nearly all facets of modern society [1]. Consequently, both their sustainability and their role in facilitating sustainable processes must be established by design [2], [3]. Software sustainability is defined as "the preservation of the long-term and beneficial use of software, and its appropriate evolution, in a context that continuously changes" [2]. RE Problem & Motivation: Regulatory initiatives increasingly require (software) organizations to integrate sustainability into their day-to-day business and operational processes. The United Nations 2030 Agenda formulated 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) [6], while the EU passed the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD), which requires companies to publish and audit sustainability-related information [7]. Regulations and laws require organizations in the software development sector to disclose both qualitative and quantitative sustainability metrics, among other obligations [1]. Consequently, integrating sustainability reporting processes into the software development life cycle becomes increasingly important. RE processes often lack systematic methods to elicit, analyze, and prioritize sustainability requirements alongside functional and non-functional requirements, and studies indicate that tool support for this integration remains limited [4]. To address this gap, we introduce JI-RADAR, which supports stakeholders involved in system design (e.g., developers, requirements engineers, project managers, and usability engineers) [5] by providing practical tools to integrate sustainability into the RE process. We extend the widely used Atlassian Jira platform [8] by implementing a ready-to-use plugin that can be directly adopted in industrial practice.

</details>


### [420] [SAKE: Software Architectural Knowledge Evaluation Benchmark for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29520)
*Tiziano Santilli,Francesco Daghero,Mayhar Tourchi Moghaddam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了SAKE基准，用于评估LLM在软件架构知识方面的推理能力，包含2154道专家策题的多选题，覆盖8个架构类别和4种上下文长度。评估11个模型发现整体准确率高但不同架构类别间表现差异明显，揭示了专业实践中的能力差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要测试LLM在语法或算法任务上的能力，无法衡量其在软件架构推理上的表现，而架构决策涉及质量属性权衡、设计模式及系统级约束，是LLM作为软件开发助手的关键能力。

Method: 构建SAKE基准，包含2154道专家策题的多选题（四选一），覆盖8个架构类别和4种上下文长度级别；在零样本和五样本设置下评估11个专有和开源模型。

Result: 整体准确率较高，但不同架构类别间性能差异显著，在专业实践核心领域存在能力缺口。

Conclusion: SAKE及其评估脚本和结果已开源，为社区提供了跟踪LLM架构推理能力的基线。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as assistants across the software development lifecycle, yet their ability to reason about software architecture remains largely unmeasured. Architectural decision-making depends on quality attribute trade-offs, design patterns, and system-level constraints, none of which are exercised by benchmarks that target syntactic or algorithmic tasks. We introduce SAKE (Software Architectural Knowledge Evaluation), a standardized and reproducible benchmark for assessing software architectural knowledge in LLMs. SAKE comprises 2154 expert-curated multiple-choice questions, each with four options, stratified across eight architectural categories and four context-length levels. We evaluate 11 proprietary and open-weight models in zero-shot and five-shot settings. Overall accuracy is high, but performance varies markedly across categories, revealing competency gaps in areas central to professional practice. SAKE, its evaluation scripts, and all results are released as open source to give the community a baseline for tracking architectural reasoning in LLMs.

</details>


### [421] [RESOURCE2SKILL: Distilling Executable Agent Skills from Human-Created Multimodal Resources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29538)
*Yijia Fan,Zonglin Di,Zimo Wen,Yifan Yang,Mingxi Cheng,Qi Dai,Bei Liu,Kai Qiu,Yue Dong,Ji Li,Chong Luo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: RESOURCE2SKILL是一个从多模态资源（教程视频、代码库、文章等）中提取可执行技能并构建分层技能维基的框架，使软件代理能检索和组合技能来提升任务表现，在多个领域取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的技能库大多手工编写、以文本为中心或仅从代理轨迹中提取，忽略了教程视频等多模态人类资源的利用。

Method: 提出RESOURCE2SKILL框架，从视频、代码、文章等多模态资源中蒸馏出可执行技能，并组织为分层多模态技能维基，每条技能包含结构化文本、代码、视觉示例、元数据和来源信息。

Result: 在7个实际创作领域，平均总体得分提升+11.9个百分点，在28个模型-领域组合中的26个优于强基线。

Conclusion: 多模态技能格式、分层组织、来源多样性、选择策略和在线获取能力对性能提升均有贡献。

Abstract: Skills are a useful abstraction for software agents, turning human and agent experience into reusable procedural knowledge. Yet existing skill libraries are mostly hand-written, text-centric, or derived from agent traces, leaving tutorial videos and other multimodal human resources largely underused. We present RESOURCE2SKILL, a framework that distills multimodal resources, including tutorial videos, repositories, articles, and reference artifacts, into executable skills for software agents. RESOURCE2SKILL organizes these skills as a hierarchical multimodal Skill Wiki, where each entry combines structured text, code, visual examples, metadata, and provenance. This design preserves complementary signals from different resources: videos capture temporal operations and visual effects, code captures executable tool patterns, and articles or artifacts provide conceptual and stylistic grounding. At inference time, agents retrieve and compose relevant skills from the wiki; when coverage is insufficient, the same construction operator can acquire new skills online. Across seven practical authoring domains, RESOURCE2SKILL improves average overall score by +11.9 percentage points over no-skill agents and outperforms strong harness baselines in 26 of 28 main-aggregate model-domain cells. Ablations confirm the value of multimodal skill format, hierarchical organization, source diversity, selection strategy, and online acquisition.

</details>


### [422] [Deforking the World of Code: A Project-Provenance Map that Recovers Cross-Forge Fork Families that Platform Graphs Cannot See](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29550)
*Audris Mockus*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对Git仓库去fork映射的方法（p2PFull），通过共享提交关系、枢纽节点星型编码和并行Louvain聚类，将原始仓库归类到真正的项目集合中，并发布了验证结果与相关数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Git仓库的fork机制导致同一提交出现在多个仓库中，基于原始仓库的流行度或传播度指标会被放大数个数量级，现有的去重方法难以准确区分真正的项目归属。

Method: 基于World of Code (WoC) V2604版本，利用全局共享提交关系（5179万个共享提交组），通过枢纽节点星型编码和并行Louvain聚类构建去fork映射p2PFull，并引入大小上限（cap250/cap500）控制巨型簇规模。

Result: 验证结果显示，与GitHub声明的fork图相比，条件性边一致率达99.01%。发布了1.341亿个子仓库的排除列表、455,550条硬分离边和240,441个独立起源的仓库清单。

Conclusion: 去fork映射有效解决了共享历史合并导致的过度聚合问题，并能发现跨平台fork族和不在GitHub上的fork根，为软件生态分析提供了更准确的基础数据。

Abstract: Forks share git history, so a commit surfaces in many repositories and any spread- or popularity-based measure over raw repositories is inflated by orders of magnitude. We release a curated deforking map for the World of Code (WoC) version V2604: p2PFull, which collapses every raw repository p into the deforked project P to which it belongs, built from the global shared-commit relation (51.79M shared-commit groups) via a hub-node star encoding and parallel Louvain clustering, plus capped variants (cap250/cap500) that bound mega-cluster size. The naive shared-history union over-merges: the project graph welds unrelated software into giant clusters (largest uncapped cluster 861,948 repositories, bridged by shared-commit groups as large as 267,200), for the same structural reason author-identity graphs do. A cheap size cap removes the boilerplate-hub bridges; a structural-bridge diagnostic, the cut that dissolved the analogous author mega-cluster, run here but deliberately not applied, shows the post-cap residual is genuine vendored history, robust to the cut, so we leave it intact. We validate the map against GitHub's declared fork graph reconstructed from GHArchive ForkEvents, finding 99.01% edge agreement conditional on both repositories being in WoC. Disagreements fall into two classes: a completeness byproduct (edges GitHub asserts but WoC has not ingested) and the central contribution, WoC-only fork families that GitHub's platform graph cannot represent, including 5.41% multi-forge families and 1.51% whose fork root is not on GitHub. We additionally release a refreshed fork-exclusion list (134.1M children, 3.4x the GHTorrent-era 39.5M) and a detached-fork inventory (455,550 hard-detached edges; 240,441 genuine independent origins). All artifacts are a self-contained, independently hosted replication package keyed to the WoC V2604 collection.

</details>


### [423] [Connecting the Models: A Global Mega-model of MDE Projects on GitHub](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29606)
*Jesús Sánchez Cuadrado*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过挖掘GitHub上7,436个MDE项目（包含32.5万个工件），构建了一个用于研究模型驱动工程实际应用状况的数据集，并提出了全局元模型以分析项目间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏关于MDE工具在实际中如何被使用和组合的实证证据，许多研究问题（如工具组合方式、环境维护情况、使用频率等）仍未得到解答。

Method: 从GitHub挖掘7,436个项目（含32.5万个MDE工件），涵盖Ecore、ATL、Xtext等代表性技术；提取仓库级信息；恢复每个项目的元模型以表示工件间关系；通过近重复分析构建全局元模型。

Result: 构建了一个包含7,436个GitHub项目、32.5万个MDE工件的数据集，并生成了全局元模型，可用于分析跨项目依赖关系和连通子图。

Conclusion: 该数据集和全局元模型为研究MDE在实际中的应用提供了基础，能够支持多项实证研究问题的回答。

Abstract: A key element of Model-Driven Engineering is the construction of domain-specific modelling environments to improve productivity and quality. In theory, dedicated technologies like EMF, ATL, Epsilon, Xtext, etc. would boost the construction of high-quality environments with a relatively modest effort by chaining the output of one tool to the input of another. However, there is little empirical evidence of how this idea has fared in reality and many open research questions remain, such as how MDE tools are used and combined, whether the resulting environments are maintained or not, which tools are used more frequently, etc.
  In this paper, we aim to build a foundation for studying how MDE is used in practice. First, we constructed a dataset by mining 7,436 Github projects comprising over 325,000 MDE artefacts. These artefacts encompass representative Eclipse EMF-related technologies, namely Ecore, Emfatic, OCL, ATL, Epsilon, QVTo, Henshin, Acceleo, Xtext, Emftext, GMF and Sirius. We also integrated into the dataset repository-level information extracted from the Git repositories and the GitHub API. From this dataset, we devised a technique to recover the mega-model of each project in order to represent the relationships between its artefacts. Then, we built a global mega-model relating the different MDE projects by performing an analysis of near-duplicates across all artefacts and grouping duplicate artefacts into single nodes and rewiring the connections. This global mega-model can be used to derive additional information like inter-project dependencies or studying connected subgraphs of artefacts. Finally, we propose a number of research questions that could be answered with the provided dataset, which we hope will foster empirical analysis of how MDE is applied.

</details>


### [424] [Bash-Commenter: Leveraging Syntax-Aware Preference Optimization to Reinforce Large Language Model for Bash Code Comment Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29709)
*Lei Yu,Jingyuan Zhang,Xin Wang,Li Yang,Fengjun Zhang,Peng Wang,Jia Xu,Jiajia Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Bash-Commenter方法，通过构建高质量数据集、持续预训练+监督微调、以及基于AST的语法感知偏好优化，显著提升了Bash脚本的自动注释生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Bash脚本因语法自由、结构复杂且缺乏注释导致可读性和可维护性差；现有自动注释方法面临训练数据不足和LLM对Bash概念理解不充分两大挑战。

Method: (1) 构建包含复杂多行Bash脚本及高质量注释的大规模数据集；(2) 在Bash数据上进行持续预训练(CPT) + 监督微调(SFT)；(3) 提出语法感知偏好优化(SAPO)，通过AST原子操作构造正确/错误脚本偏好对，实现细粒度语义学习。

Result: 在单行命令上BLEU-4=33.40%, METEOR=58.26%, ROUGE-L=57.03%；在多行脚本上BLEU-4=22.15%, METEOR=43.89%, ROUGE-L=32.80%，全面超越SOTA基线。

Conclusion: 提出Bash-Commenter有效解决了Bash脚本注释生成问题，人类和LLM评估均验证其在正确性、完整性和自然性上的优越性。

Abstract: Bash script comprehension is challenging due to Bash's syntactic freedom and complex command structures. Despite its critical role in system administration, Bash scripts often lack adequate comments, hindering readability and maintainability. Existing automated comment generation approaches face two main challenges: (1) limited training datasets that inadequately represent real-world Bash usage patterns; and (2) insufficient understanding of Bash-specific concepts by Large Language Models (LLMs). To address these, we propose Bash-Commenter, an advanced comment generation method based on LLaMA-3.1-8B. First, we construct a comprehensive dataset of complex, multi-line Bash scripts with high-quality comments. Second, we conduct Continual Pre-training (CPT) on large-scale Bash data, followed by Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT), strengthening the model's foundational knowledge of Bash syntax and semantics. Finally, we introduce Syntax-Aware Preference Optimization (SAPO), which constructs preference pairs by applying atomic operations to a script's Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), creating minimal pairs of correct and subtly incorrect scripts for fine-grained semantics learning. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving 33.40% BLEU-4, 58.26% METEOR, and 57.03% ROUGE-L for 1,064 single-line commands, and 22.15% BLEU-4, 43.89% METEOR, and 32.80% ROUGE-L for 1,046 multi-line scripts. Human and LLM evaluations further confirm superior comment quality in correctness, completeness, and naturalness.

</details>


### [425] [MicroAgent: Context-Augmented Multi-Agent Framework for Automatic Microservice Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29742)
*Zishan Su,Junjie Huang,Shiwen Shan,Xingyan Chen,Hui Zeng,Yuxin Su,Yanlin Wang,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MicroAgent是一个上下文增强的多智能体框架，通过将微服务分解任务划分为五个子任务并分配给专门智能体，结合多粒度上下文和设计原则分析工具，在10个Java Web应用上实现了89.2%的平均分解准确率，比现有最优方法提升24.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微服务架构（MSA）虽然能提升软件的可扩展性、敏捷性和可维护性，但将单体应用分解为微服务的过程面临巨大挑战：手动分解耗时耗力，现有自动化方法难以捕捉复杂应用的语义信息，而简单应用大语言模型会忽略关键上下文信息和设计原则，导致分解效果不佳。

Method: MicroAgent框架将微服务分解过程划分为五个不同的子任务，每个子任务由专门的智能体负责。为每个智能体提供定制化的多粒度上下文信息，以保持分析聚焦并缓解信息过载。同时，集成分析工具来指导智能体的决策，确保分解结果符合既定的设计原则。

Result: 在10个Java Web应用的实验评估中，MicroAgent实现了89.2%的平均分解准确率，比现有最优方法高出24.6%。此外，通过案例研究展示了该框架的实际应用价值。

Conclusion: MicroAgent通过多智能体协作、上下文增强和设计原则约束，有效提升了微服务分解的准确性和实用性，为单体应用向微服务架构迁移提供了可靠的自动化解决方案。

Abstract: The adoption of Microservice Architecture (MSA) has revolutionized software engineering by enhancing scalability, agility, and maintainability over traditional monolithic applications. As more developers transition their legacy systems to microservice-based architectures, effective microservice decomposition-partitioning monolithic applications into highly cohesive services-becomes vital. However, this decomposition task presents significant challenges. Manual approaches are time-consuming and labor-intensive. Existing automated methods often fail to capture the necessary semantic insights from complex applications, while naive applications of Large Language Models tend to overlook crucial contextual information and design principles, leading to suboptimal results.
  To address these challenges, we propose MicroAgent, a Context-Augmented Multi-Agent Framework for Microservice Decomposition. Our framework divides the decomposition process into five distinct subtasks and assigns each to a specialized agent. To enhance the effectiveness of each agent, we provide tailored, multi-granularity context that keeps its analysis focused and mitigates information overload. Furthermore, to ensure the decomposition adheres to established design principles, we integrate analytical tools that guide the agents' decision-making. Experimental evaluations on 10 Java Web applications demonstrate that MicroAgent achieves an average decomposition accuracy of 89.2%, outperforming the state-of-the-art method by 24.6%. We also conduct a case study to highlight the practical benefits of our design.

</details>


### [426] [Uncovering Similar but Different Packages in PyPI and Potential Security Threats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29785)
*Sunha Park,Soojin Han,Seunghoon Woo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对PyPI中的包复制现象进行了大规模研究，发现大量复制包存在，并从流行包、脆弱包和恶意包三个维度分析了其特性和安全威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PyPI上存在大量复制已有代码库的包，这不仅混淆开发者，还会传播已知漏洞并催生恶意包，但目前缺乏对此现象的系统性研究。

Method: 基于PyPI全部仓库的三分之一（约20万个包），从三个视角（流行包复制、脆弱包复制、恶意包复制）系统分析复制包的特征与潜在威胁。

Result: (1) 识别出1,361个复制前3000个流行项目的包；(2) 发现256个先前未知的复制脆弱包；(3) 在3,883个已知恶意包中，186个（4.79%）复制了流行包，并进一步发现7个先前未知的复制恶意包。

Conclusion: 包复制在PyPI中是一个普遍且被忽视的安全问题，它制造了漏洞盲区并成为恶意软件分发的重要攻击向量。

Abstract: In this study, we present a large-scale, in-depth study of package replication in PyPI. As a vital platform, PyPI streamlines Python package distribution for developers. However, beyond small-scale code cloning, we observe that many replicated packages exist on PyPI, which duplicate most of the codebase from existing packages. Such replication not only confuses developers but also propagates known vulnerabilities and enables the creation of new malicious packages. To address this issue, we comprehensively examine the characteristics and potential threats of replicated packages. Using one-third of the entire PyPI repository (200K packages), we investigate replication from three perspectives: replication of popular packages, vulnerable packages, and malicious packages. Our experiments reveal three critical findings about package replication in PyPI: (1) by identifying 1,361 replicated packages of the top 3K popular projects, we show that replication frequently redistributes substantial portions of existing packages under different maintainers; (2) by uncovering 256 previously unknown replicated vulnerable packages, we demonstrate that replication creates vulnerability blind spots that current detection tools rarely catch; (3) by analyzing 3,883 known malicious packages, we found that 186 (4.79%) replicated popular ones, and this pattern further led us to identify seven previously unknown replicated malicious packages, highlighting its role as an attack vector for malware distribution through minor modifications and code injection.

</details>


### [427] [Rethinking Build vs. Buy Decisions in Enterprise Software: Navigating Trade-offs through a Structured Decision-Support Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29816)
*Janardan Misra,Vikrant Kaulgud,Adam Burden,Sanjay Podder*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结构化决策支持方法，用于在软件开发中系统分析构建与购买决策，通过本体论因素模型、规则推理和参考匹配，帮助企业在缺乏历史数据的情况下提高决策的质量、透明度和可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业在软件构建与购买决策中面临日益复杂的权衡因素（战略、技术、成本、风险），但实践中常依赖碎片化经验和非正式推理，难以系统化分析和证明决策合理性。

Method: 基于本体论的决策因素模型（涵盖战略、应用特性、成本预算、风险四个维度），结合规则推理和参考级匹配，即使在冷启动场景下也能支持决策；实现为轻量级咨询工具，提供透明推理。

Result: 通过金融领域案例验证，展示了结构化因素分析如何阐明决策依据并揭示条件变化对决策的影响。

Conclusion: 将决策标准显式化、系统化可比较，能够显著提升企业构建与购买决策的质量、透明度和可审计性。

Abstract: Build-versus-buy decisions remain a persistent challenge in enterprise software development, shaped by competing strategic, technical, cost, and risk considerations. The increasing availability of third-party solutions alongside the growing feasibility of custom development through cloud-native technologies, APIs, and low-code platforms has further amplified the complexity of these decisions. In practice, organizations often rely on fragmented expertise and informal reasoning, making it difficult to systematically analyze trade-offs or justify decisions over time. This paper presents a structured decision-support approach designed to augment build-versus-buy decision-making in such contexts. The approach is grounded in an ontology of decision factors spanning strategic considerations, application characteristics, cost and budget constraints, and risk dimensions. It combines this factor model with rule-based reasoning and reference-level matching to support decision-making even in cold-start scenarios where historical data is unavailable. The approach is implemented as a lightweight advisory artifact that enables users to evaluate relevant factors, explore trade-offs, and derive recommendations with transparent reasoning. The applicability of the approach is illustrated through a finance domain case, demonstrating how structured factor analysis can clarify decision rationale and highlight conditions under which decisions may change over time. The results suggest that making decision criteria explicit and systematically comparable can improve the quality, transparency, and auditability of build-versus-buy decisions in enterprise settings.

</details>


### [428] [SpreadsheetBench 2: Evaluating Agents on End-to-End Business Spreadsheet Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29955)
*Jian Zhu,Yuzheng Zhang,Zeyao Ma,Bohan Zhang,Armin Schoepf,Daniel Woloch,Peter Yiliu Wang,Guangyu Robert Yang,Samuel Jacob,Siddharth Nagisetty,Abhiram Chundru,Jean Lin,Spencer Mateega,Jing Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SpreadsheetBench 2，一个面向真实商业场景的工作流级电子表格基准测试，包含321个多工作表任务，评估8个大语言模型后发现最佳模型准确率仅34.89%，调试准确率低至12.00%，表明现有系统在真实工作流上远不可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电子表格基准测试仅评估单公式生成或局部单元格编辑等孤立操作，缺乏对端到端工作流的评估能力，无法反映真实商业环境中的复杂需求。

Method: 构建了包含生成、调试、可视化三类任务的基准测试，数据来源于真实财务报表和企业文件，由领域专家标注验证。每个任务平均涉及11.8个工作表和593.5个单元格修改。在统一的多轮智能体框架下评估了8个前沿大语言模型及若干基于LLM的电子表格产品。

Result: 最佳模型整体任务准确率仅34.89%，调试准确率低至12.00%。轨迹分析和失败分类表明，电子表格检查不足和目标单元格选择错误是主要瓶颈。

Conclusion: SpreadsheetBench 2作为挑战性测试平台，揭示了当前LLM在真实电子表格工作流上的显著不足，为推进可靠电子表格自动化提供了重要基准。

Abstract: Spreadsheets are widely used for business analysis, financial modeling, reporting, and decision-making. However, most existing spreadsheet benchmarks evaluate isolated operations such as single-formula generation or local cell edits, and therefore fail to capture end-to-end workflows in realistic business settings. We introduce \textsc{SpreadsheetBench 2}, a workflow-level benchmark for spreadsheet agents that covers three task categories: generation, debugging, and visualization. The benchmark is constructed from authentic business data, including financial reports and corporate filings, and is annotated and validated by domain experts. The benchmark contains 321 tasks; each instance averages 11.8 worksheets and requires 593.5 cell modifications, reflecting large multi-sheet workbooks with cross-sheet dependencies. We evaluate eight frontier large language models under a unified multi-turn agent scaffold, and additionally include several LLM-based spreadsheet products as complementary baselines. Results show that current systems remain far from reliable on real-world workflows: the best model achieves 34.89\% overall task accuracy, and debugging accuracy is as low as 12.00\%. Trajectory analysis and a failure taxonomy further indicate that insufficient spreadsheet inspection and incorrect target-cell selection are the dominant bottlenecks. Together, these findings position \textsc{SpreadsheetBench 2} as a challenging testbed for advancing reliable spreadsheet automation. Project page: https://spreadsheetbench.github.io/

</details>


### [429] [SWE-Together: Evaluating Coding Agents in Interactive User Sessions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29957)
*Yifan Wu,Zhuokai Zhao,Songlin Li,Ho Hin Lee,Jiacheng Zhu,Shirley Wu,Tianhe Yu,Serena Li,Lizhu Zhang,Xiangjun Fan,Shengzhi Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了SWE-Together，一个基于真实用户-智能体编程会话构建的多轮交互基准测试，并利用LLM用户模拟器来评估编程智能体的协作能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编码智能体基准测试多为静态评估，无法反映真实编程辅助中多轮交互、目标澄清、约束添加等场景。

Method: 从11,260条真实会话中筛选出109个仓库级任务，构建反应式LLM用户模拟器保留原始用户意图，通过最终仓库正确性和纠正反馈轮数两个指标评估智能体。

Result: 更强的编码智能体在最终成功率上更高，同时所需的干预次数更少，表明用户体验得到了改善。

Conclusion: 多轮交互基准能更真实地反映编码智能体的协作能力，更强的智能体在成功率和用户干预需求方面均表现更优。

Abstract: Most coding-agent benchmarks are static: an agent receives a complete task description up front and is judged only by its final code. Real coding assistance is interactive, with users clarifying goals, adding constraints, and correcting mistakes over multiple turns. We introduce SWE-Together, a multi-turn benchmark reconstructed from real user-agent coding sessions. To make real interactions verifiable, we curate 109 repository-level tasks from 11,260 recorded sessions, selecting sessions with recoverable repository states, clear user goals, and observable outcomes. To replay these interactions across agents, we build a reactive LLM-based user simulator that preserves the original users' intents and provides feedback when the coding agent's progress requires it. To evaluate agents as collaborators, we measure both final repository correctness and the number of corrective feedback turns required during the interaction. Experiments with frontier coding agents show that stronger agents generally achieve higher final success rates while requiring fewer interventions, suggesting an improved user experience.

</details>


### [430] [MCP Server Architecture Patterns for LLM-Integrated Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30317)
*Carson Rodrigues,Oysturn Vas*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器生态进行了系统分析，识别出五种架构模式（资源网关、工具编排器、有状态会话服务器、代理聚合器、领域适配器）、四种反模式及跨领域关注点，并通过量化评估验证了分类可靠性、传输开销和工具选择精度阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP协议自2024年11月发布后迅速在GitHub上涌现大量实现，但学术界尚无文献描述其生产环境中的生态结构化方式，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 采用行业经验论文方法，枚举15个独立开发的服务（5个生产级+10个公共注册库），以Gamma等人提出的结构化形式（上下文、问题、解决方案、后果）描述五种架构模式；并设计三项定量实验：两名独立LLM评分者间的分类信度（Cohen's kappa）、传输开销测量、工具选择精度阈值测试。

Result: 分类信度Cohen's kappa=0.76（识别出三个模式边界模糊点）；量化了回环及跨主机路径的传输开销；发现Claude Haiku 4.5在10-15个工具/上下文时精度降至90%以下，Sonnet 4则在20-30个工具区间出现下降。

Conclusion: 本文为MCP服务器开发提供了可复用的架构分类体系与量化指导，包括模式选择依据、反模式规避建议，并开源了完整复现包（代码、语料、提示词）。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP), introduced by Anthropic in November 2024, defines a standardized interface for connecting large language models (LLMs) to external tools, data sources, and services. Within months of release, hundreds of community-built MCP servers appeared on GitHub, but no software-maintenance literature has yet described how the ecosystem is being structured in production. This industry experience paper catalogues five recurring MCP server architectural patterns observed across an enumerated corpus of fifteen independently developed servers (five production servers from the ANSYR voice AI platform plus ten public servers from the official MCP registry): Resource Gateway, Tool Orchestrator, Stateful Session Server, Proxy Aggregator, and Domain-Specific Adapter. Each pattern is described in the structured form of Gamma et al.: context, problem, solution, and consequences. We also document four anti-patterns and a set of cross-cutting concerns around authentication, versioning, and observability. The quantitative evaluation contributes three measurements: inter-rater reliability of the taxonomy across two independent LLM raters on 54 held-out servers (Cohen's kappa = 0.76), which also localizes three pattern-boundary ambiguities; transport overhead measured end-to-end on loopback and modeled for cross-host paths; and a tool-count study showing tool-selection accuracy drops below 90% between 10 and 15 tools per context for Claude Haiku 4.5 and between 20 and 30 tools for Sonnet 4. Code, corpus, and prompts are released as a replication package.

</details>


### [431] [How do Execution Features Improve Statistical Fault Localization? An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30324)
*Marius Smytzek,Andreas Zeller*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 通过在执行谱中融入数据流、值及分支条件等特征，并结合随机森林重要性映射与统计故障定位(SFL)公式，显著提升了故障定位的准确率并降低了开发者检查成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的统计故障定位仅依赖行执行信息（通过/失败谱），忽略了数据流、变量值及分支条件等关键执行特征，导致定位精度有限。本研究旨在探究引入这些额外执行特征是否能提升定位准确性和降低开发者排查负担。

Method: 使用EFDD提取所有Tests4Py主题的执行特征，为每个主题训练随机森林模型，将特征重要性映射回源代码行，再将得到的权重与已有的SFL公式相结合。

Result: 在参考补丁准确率、行级与函数级排查工作量、鲁棒性及可行性等多个维度上，采用混杂调整混合效应模型、配对统计检验和结果无关的质量检查进行评估。

Conclusion: 融合执行特征能有效提升统计故障定位的性能，减少开发者在调试过程中的不必要检查。

Abstract: Automated fault localization helps developers find faults in large code bases. Statistical fault localization (SFL) ranks suspicious lines from pass/fail spectra, but line execution alone misses information like data-flow, values, or branch conditions that explain why a failure occurs.
  This study evaluates whether augmenting SFL with execution features improves localization accuracy and developer-oriented inspection effort. We extract execution features with EFDD for all Tests4Py subjects, train per-subject random forests, map importances to source lines, and combine the resulting weights with established SFL formulas. The evaluation measures reference-patch accuracy, line- and function-level effort, robustness, and feasibility using a confounder-adjusted mixed-effects model, corroborated by paired statistical tests and outcome-neutral quality checks.

</details>


### [432] [The Illusion of Agentic Complexity in README.md Generation: Evaluating Single-Agent vs. Multi-Agent RAG Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30524)
*Abu Saleh,Tesfay Welegebreal Tesfay,Phuong T. Nguyen,Juri Di Rocco,Muhammad Umar Zeshan,Davide Di Ruscio*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文比较了单Agent、多Agent系统和开发者引导规划三种架构在生成GitHub README文件时的效果，发现单Agent管道在词汇质量上与MAS相当，但减少86%的token消耗且速度快一倍；而MAS在结构一致性上表现更好（98%）；开发者引导规划变体则整体文档质量最高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多Agent系统常被用于软件工程任务，但其架构复杂性对实际效率的影响尚未充分研究，因此需要系统评估不同架构在README文件生成任务上的性能差异。

Method: 对单Agent管道、专门化MAS和开发者引导规划（DevPlan）三种基于RAG的架构进行系统比较，以LARCH为基线，以原始README为真实标准，通过词汇质量、token消耗、速度和结构一致性等指标评估。

Result: 单Agent管道与MAS词汇质量相当，但token消耗减少86%、速度快两倍；MAS结构一致性达98%；自主规划是主要瓶颈，开发者引导规划变体产生最高整体文档质量。

Conclusion: 架构设计中存在关键权衡：单Agent方案在效率上占优，MAS在结构上表现更好，而引入轻量级开发者引导的自适应规划可兼顾两方面优势，达到最佳文档质量。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized to automate several software engineering tasks, including code completion, code summarization, testing, and the generation of repository-level documentation. While Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) are often adopted to support such tasks under the premise that task decomposition improves performance, the impact of architectural complexity on practical efficiency remains under-examined. This study empirically evaluates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) dependent architectures for the generation of README files for GitHub repositories. In this work, we conducted a systematic comparison between a Single-Agent pipeline, a specialized MAS, and a developer-guided planning (DevPlan) variant, benchmarked against LARCH -- a state-of-the-art baseline -- and the original ground truth. Results indicate a critical architectural trade-off: the Single-Agent pipeline achieves lexical quality comparable to MAS while reducing token consumption by 86% and operating at twice the speed. In contrast, manual taxonomy analysis demonstrates that MAS achieves high structural consistency (98%), resolving formatting issues observed in single-agent approaches. Autonomous planning is identified as the primary pipeline bottleneck; incorporating lightweight developer-guided plans produces the highest overall documentation quality, surpassing all the analyzed configurations.

</details>


### [433] [PyMETA: A Benchmark Dataset for Hierarchical Student Code Error Classification with Python-Interpreter-Based Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30610)
*Chuyue Li,Ziqi Tang,Jingyi Wang,Yu Wu,Kazuma Hashimoto,Lingyu Gao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出PyMETA数据集（48,646份学生Python代码提交），包含三级层次化错误分类体系（14种细粒度类型），评估了微调模型和LLM在代码错误检测中的表现，发现提示LLM仍不如微调小模型，且LLM普遍过度分类为逻辑错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码错误检测方法缺乏大规模数据集、多错误分析能力及统一的错误分类体系，无法满足教育场景中上下文敏感的调试需求。

Method: 构建PyMETA数据集（48,646份学生提交，含97份专家标注的多错误子集），采用三级层次化分类体系（二元→粗粒度→14种细粒度类型），评估2个微调模型和4个LLM的分类性能与运行成本。

Result: Gemini 2.5 Pro在多错误提示中以81.8%宏F1最优；微调小模型优于提示LLM；LLM普遍过度分类为逻辑错误，GPT-3.5过度预测率最高，Gemini 2.5 Pro最低。

Conclusion: PyMETA为基于LLM的代码错误研究建立了数据基础，揭示了当前模型在错误类型上的显著差异和过度分类问题。

Abstract: With the advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), code error detection has extended beyond traditional IDE diagnostics to context-sensitive debugging in educational scenarios. However, existing approaches lack large-scale datasets, multi-error analysis, and unified error taxonomies. To address this, we introduce PyMETA, a large-scale Python code error classification dataset of 48,646 student submissions, with single-error labels for all samples and a diagnostic subset of 97 expert-annotated multi-error samples. The dataset uses a three-level hierarchical taxonomy, from a binary error/no-error split down to 14 fine-grained error types grounded in Python's official exception hierarchy. We evaluate multi-level classification tasks on two finetuned models and four LLMs with prompting, comparing their classification performance and runtime cost. For multi-error prompting, the best model, Gemini 2.5 Pro, achieves 81.8% macro F1 under the "contains" criterion. We observe that: 1) prompted LLMs still underperform finetuned smaller models; 2) models exhibit significant disparities across error types; 3) most LLMs over-classify code as Logic Error, with GPT-3.5 showing the highest Logic Error Overprediction Rate and Gemini 2.5 Pro the lowest. Our work establishes a data foundation and provides insights for LLM-based code error research.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [434] [HyphaeDB: A Living Knowledge Topology for Agent-First Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28781)
*Krishna Halaharvi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: HyphaeDB 是一种基于 HNSW 图拓扑的智能体原生记忆基础设施，通过 gossip 协议实现智能体间的知识传播，将向量数据库从被动存储转变为多智能体通信网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有向量数据库和智能体记忆框架都将记忆视为被动存储，需要智能体显式查询，缺乏通过记忆层实现智能体间知识传播的机制。

Method: 基于 HNSW 图拓扑，将智能体作为向量空间中的节点，采用 gossip 协议通过邻居结构传播知识，并引入能量衰减机制。架构包含知识节点、拓扑边和记忆差分三个原语，以及通过共识驱动的多层抽象层级晋升机制。

Result: 在 PostgreSQL + pgvector 上实现了参考系统，并在多智能体软件工程方法 Swarm-Driven Development 中进行了具体部署验证。

Conclusion: HyphaeDB 是首个将可导航小世界拓扑与 gossip 知识传播相结合的多智能体协调系统，能够实现矛盾检测、模式结晶和共识形成等涌现行为。

Abstract: Every existing vector database and agent memory framework treats memory as passive storage that agents query explicitly. No system propagates knowledge between agents through the memory layer itself. We introduce HyphaeDB, an agent-native memory infrastructure that reinterprets the Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) graph topology the data structure at the core of every modern vector database not as a search optimization, but as a communication fabric for multi-agent AI systems. In HyphaeDB, agents are nodes in the vector space with persistent positions, knowledge propagates via a gossip protocol through the graph's neighbor structure with energy-based attenuation, and emergent behaviors contradiction detection, pattern crystallization, and consensus formation arise from the combination of topology, propagation dynamics, and local interaction rules. We present the architecture built on three primitives (knowledge nodes, topology edges, and memory diffs), a multi-layer abstraction hierarchy with promotion via emergent consensus, and theoretical analysis grounding the system in small-world network theory, epidemic broadcast protocols, and swarm intelligence. We provide a reference implementation on PostgreSQL with pgvector and describe a concrete deployment in Swarm-Driven Development, a multi-agent software engineering methodology. HyphaeDB represents, to our knowledge, the first system to combine navigable small world topology with gossip-based knowledge propagation for multi-agent coordination.

</details>


### [435] [Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28374)
*Michael Nguyen,Quoc Nguyen,Paul Vuong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RSEA是一个携带三层自然语言状态（策略、技能、剧本）的递归自我进化智能体。通过严格保留策略，它在四个基准测试中表现不俗，但并无通用最佳方案；无保护的上下文演化则存在高风险和不稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常只在单个基准上报告LLM智能体通过演化自然语言工件（如反射、工作流、优化提示等）带来的提升，但缺乏跨基准的公平对比，导致对这类方法的真正优势和风险认知不清。本文旨在通过苹果对苹果的比较，揭示更清晰的图景。

Method: 提出RSEA（递归自演化智能体），维护一个三层自然语言状态：命令性策略（imperative strategy）、可复用技能（reusable skills）和程序性剧本（procedural playbook）。每一代中，RSEA从自身轨迹重写所有三层，并使用一个严格保留门（hold-out gate）——仅在候选版本不在保留验证集上退步时才提交，确保进化是单调安全的。

Result: 在ALFWorld、GAIA、(τ)-bench和WebShop四个基准上，与ReAct、Reflexion、GEPA、AWM、ACE和Dynamic Cheatsheet六个基线对比发现：1）没有通用最佳方法——RSEA在ALFWorld上最佳（69.3%），但AWM在强骨干工具任务上最优；2）无保护的上下文演化（如Dynamic Cheatsheet）高方差且不安全，在ALFWorld上表现良好但在WebShop上完全崩溃（0.14 vs 0.43）；3）RSEA的严格保留选择确保了递归自演化的单调安全性，从未显著劣于基础智能体。

Conclusion: 递归自我演化需要严格保留门控机制来保证安全性和稳定性；不同演化方法各有适用场景，不存在通用最优策略；无保护的上下文演化虽然在特定任务上表现优异，但可能在其他任务上产生灾难性退步。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly improved without weight updates by evolving a natural-language artifact, such as reflections, workflows, playbooks, cheatsheets, or optimized prompts, that conditions a frozen policy. Such methods are typically reported as wins on the single benchmark where they help. We study them apples-to-apples and surface a sharper picture. We introduce RSEA, a Recursive Self-Evolving Agent that carries a compact three-layer natural-language state: an imperative strategy, reusable skills, and a procedural playbook. Across generations, RSEA rewrites all three layers from its own trajectories and commits a candidate only if it does not regress on a disjoint held-out split, using a strict keep-better gate.
  Across four diverse benchmarks, ALFWorld, GAIA, (τ)-bench, and WebShop, and six faithful baselines, ReAct, Reflexion, GEPA, AWM, ACE, and Dynamic Cheatsheet, all evaluated on one shared local backbone, we find three main results. First, no artifact universally wins. RSEA is the strongest single-pass method on ALFWorld, reaching 69.3% compared with 64.6% for ReAct (McNemar (p=0.015)), and reaches 79.4% with retry, the best overall result. However, concrete-workflow induction, represented by AWM, is best on the strong-backbone tool-use tasks. Second, unguarded context evolution is high-variance and unsafe. Dynamic Cheatsheet, which curates context online without a held-out gate, is near-best on ALFWorld at 70.7%, yet collapses on WebShop, with a score of 0.14 compared with 0.43 for ReAct. Third, RSEA's strict held-out selection is what makes recursive self-evolution monotone-safe: it never significantly underperforms the base agent on any benchmark and falls back to vanilla ReAct when evolved context would hurt.

</details>


### [436] [Mixture of Debaters: Learn to Debate at Architectural Level in Multi-Agent Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29425)
*Dayong Liang,Kaisong Gong,Yi Cai,Changmeng Zheng,Xiao-Yong Wei*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MoD框架通过混合专家范式在单模型中实现动态自我辩论，相比传统多代理辩论系统，延迟降低3.7倍，token消耗减少87%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多种代理辩论框架存在两个关键局限：静态架构（代理角色和协调模式在设计时固定）以及需要实例化多个模型副本导致巨大计算开销。

Method: 提出混合辩论者框架，包含三个核心组件：1）双路由机制解耦角色分配与流程控制；2）动量切换通过局部上下文平滑token级路由，减少专家切换抖动；3）统一自我辩论将辩论角色封装为轻量专家模块，消除代理间通信同时保持行为多样性。

Result: 在多模态基准测试中，MoD优于单模型基线和传统多代理系统，准确率更高，延迟降低3.7倍，token消耗减少87%。

Conclusion: MoD框架有效解决了多代理辩论系统的高计算开销和静态架构问题，通过单模型内的动态自我辩论实现了更高效、更准确的推理能力。

Abstract: Existing multi-agent debate frameworks suffer from two critical limitations: they rely on static architectures where agent roles and coordination patterns are fixed at design time, and they require instantiating multiple model copies, incurring substantial computational overhead. We propose Mixture of Debaters (MoD), a unified framework that enables dynamic self-debate within a single model by leveraging the Mixture-of-Experts paradigm. We address three key challenges in adapting MoE for dialectical reasoning: (1) dual-routing that decouples role allocation from process flow, dynamically determining when to debate versus when to synthesize; (2) momentum switching that smooths token-level routing with local context, reducing expert-switch jitter; and (3) unified self-debate that encapsulates diverse debating personas into lightweight expert modules, eliminating inter-agent communication while preserving behavioral diversity. Extensive experiments on multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that MoD outperforms both single-model baselines and conventional multi-agent systems, achieving superior accuracy with 3.7x lower latency and 87% reduction in token consumption.The source code can be accessed at https://github.com/YongLD/MoD.

</details>


### [437] [Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28471)
*Zhixuan Li,Jiangan Yuan,Han Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出“能力切片”（capability slice）概念，建立了一套从评测失败到数据干预的可闭环分析方法，并通过两个案例验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型预训练中，模型能力是核心变量但无法直接观测；实际优化中，工程师观察到评测失败后只能依靠直觉推断数据问题，缺乏系统性的从评测到数据的映射方法。

Method: 提出“能力切片”——一组共享背景条件、任务类型、求解操作和输出约束的评测样本，作为细粒度评测单元；围绕该单元构建评测分类体系、非指令数据分类体系以及映射规则，形成从基准级失败到数据干预的闭环。

Result: 两个案例：1）持续预训练导致BBH下降46.82%，诊断发现是<EOS>掩码损失问题而非推理能力下降，修复后BBH回升至66.44；2）数学推理弱项通过求解操作分解为具体失败组合，定向采样使AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128从6.67/0.00提升至26.67。

Conclusion: 该方法使评测到数据的推断变得可常规化、可审计、可实验验证，而非依赖直觉。

Abstract: Model capability is the central variable in LLM pre-training, yet is never observed directly: data shapes it prospectively, while evaluation reveals it only retrospectively, compressing samples, prompts, decoding, and scoring rules into one noisy score. Practical optimization runs this backward: a failure is observed first, and the engineer must infer the corpus fix. The two sides speak incompatible vocabularies -- benchmark names and per-sample correctness versus data sources, domains, and quality labels -- so this inference is usually intuition, not method. We close this gap with the \emph{capability slice}: a group of evaluation samples sharing background condition, task type, solving operation, and output constraint -- precise enough to localize a single weakness yet stable enough to survive aggregation, unlike a benchmark name, too coarse, or a single sample, too noisy. Built around this unit, an evaluation taxonomy, a non-instruction data taxonomy, and mapping rules form a closed loop turning a benchmark-level failure into a targeted, testable data intervention. We test this loop on two case studies pulling in opposite directions. First, the loop rules the data out: continued pre-training drives BBH down by $-46.82\%$, but diagnosis traces this to a single masked \texttt{\textless EOS\textgreater} loss rather than weakened reasoning; restoring it recovers BBH to $66.44$, above the original checkpoint, without changing the data. Second, the loop rules the data in: a persistent math-reasoning weakness is decomposed by solving operation into specific failing combinations, and a weakness-targeted sampling procedure built from it lifts AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128 from $6.67$/$0.00$ to $26.67$ each. The same unmodified loop reaches opposite, correct verdicts in both cases, showing the evaluation-to-data inference can be routine, auditable, and experimentally validated rather than intuitive.

</details>


### [438] [GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28514)
*Amit Parekh,Sabrina McCallum,Kareem Al-Hasan,Malvina Nikandrou,Alessandro Suglia,Ioannis Konstas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出GPTNT基准测试，基于合作游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》，要求双智能体在实时、异步、信息不对称条件下协作拆弹。实验表明，当前最先进模型均无法实时拆除任何炸弹，而人类玩家可以完成。该基准测试揭示了模型在状态追踪、时间压力、歧义处理和错误恢复方面的关键缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试通常孤立研究时间压力、信息不对称和沟通不完美等协作条件，缺乏综合评估多模态模型在真实协作场景中表现的基准。

Method: 基于合作视频游戏《Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes》构建GPTNT基准测试，两个智能体分别担任"操作者"（能看到并操作炸弹但无拆弹说明）和"指导者"（有拆弹说明但看不到炸弹），需要在实时倒计时下异步通信协作拆弹。通过扣留说明手册、合作伙伴或两者来隔离评估模型即时推理能力。

Result: 所有测试的闭源和开源模型均无法实时拆除任何炸弹，而人类玩家可以完成。模型在状态追踪、时间压力下的高效行动、歧义处理和错误恢复方面表现出关键弱点。

Conclusion: GPTNT作为一个持续演进的协作性能基准测试，能够衡量当前评估未覆盖的协作能力，并随着模型进步而发展。

Abstract: Multimodal models are increasingly deployed to solve tasks collaboratively with humans or other artificial agents. Existing benchmarks show that these models possess many of the required component capabilities, but the conditions that coincide in collaboration, including time pressure, information asymmetry, and imperfect communication, are usually studied in isolation. We introduce GPTNT, a benchmark built on the cooperative video game Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes, in which two agents must coordinate to defuse procedurally generated bomb puzzles against a live countdown. One agent can see and manipulate the bomb but does not have the defusal instructions; the other has the instructions but cannot see or manipulate the bomb. Neither agent can succeed alone: success requires effective and efficient communication. Unlike turn-based proxies, GPTNT requires agents to act asynchronously and communicate in real time. GPTNT is designed to separate collaboration from reliance on memorized solutions: the instruction manual, the partner, or both can be withheld to isolate what a model derives in the moment from what it already knows. We show that GPTNT poses a substantial challenge for state-of-the-art systems: none of the closed- or open-source models we test defuses a single bomb in real time, a bar that human players clear. Through controlled experiments, we identify critical weaknesses in state tracking, efficient action under time pressure, ambiguity handling, and error recovery. We release GPTNT as a benchmark for collaborative performance that current evaluations leave unmeasured. Because it runs on the real game, GPTNT benefits from procedural generation and inherits a living modding community, allowing the benchmark to evolve as models improve rather than being solved once and retired.

</details>


### [439] [Budgeted Act-or-Defer Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation with Local Reliability Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29654)
*Mengdie Flora Wang,Haochen Xie,Guanghui Wang,Devin Zhang,Jae Oh Woo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种预算约束下的"行动或延迟"决策框架，用于多智能体LLM推理系统。通过k近邻置信下界对辩论前缀进行状态评估，仅在可靠性超过用户指定阈值时才采取行动，并提供了可审计的错误行动预算保证（β = δ + α + ε_act），同时引入了归一化预算使用率WA/β来跨任务评估安全性。实验显示，在6个基准测试上，该方法仅使用9-12%的预申预算，达到84%自动化和96%行动准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM deliberation能提升推理性能，但实际部署中需要解决一个关键问题：何时当前答案足够可靠可以自动执行，何时需要升级到人工审核。现有方法缺乏一个可审计、有理论保证的决策框架来管理这种"行动或延迟"的权衡。

Method: 将问题形式化为预算约束下的act-or-defer决策。每轮将辩论前缀映射到低维状态，利用校准数据计算k近邻置信下界；仅当下界超过用户指定的可靠性阈值时才行动。通过分解β=δ+α+ε_act来认证错误行动控制，并针对不同难度任务采用相对预算（基于训练数据的最终轮错误率），用归一化预算使用率WA/β评估安全性。

Result: 在6个基准测试上对比9个基线方法，该方法仅使用9-12%的预申预算，达到最高84%自动化和96%行动准确率；在压力测试数据集上，系统会主动延迟而非强行自动化，体现了安全性。

Conclusion: 该方法无需逐任务的事后阈值搜索，能够在部署前根据用户声明的错误行动预算，在显式假设下转化为可审计的行动或延迟操作点，为多智能体LLM系统的安全部署提供了理论保障和实用框架。

Abstract: Multi-agent deliberation among LLMs can improve reasoning, but deployment requires deciding when the current answer is reliable enough to act on and when it should be escalated to human review. We formulate this as budgeted act-or-defer decision making. At each round, the system maps the debate prefix to a low-dimensional state, computes a $k$-nearest-neighbor lower confidence bound on state-conditional correctness using calibration data, and acts only when the bound exceeds a user-specified reliability threshold. The certificate controls wrong actions through the decomposition $β= δ+ α+ \varepsilon_{\mathrm{act}}$, separating calibration failure, residual action risk, and representation gap. The guarantee is conditional, not distribution-free: it relies on a valid local bias envelope and an action-region representation-gap bound, and each assumption is paired with falsification-style diagnostics. Because the same absolute wrong-action budget has different meanings across tasks of different difficulty, we set budgets relative to each task's final-round error using training data only, and evaluate safety by normalized budget usage $\mathrm{WA}/β$. On six benchmarks against nine baselines, the method uses 9--12% of the pre-declared budget on activated datasets, reaching up to 84% automation and 96% acted-on accuracy; on stress-test datasets, it defers rather than forcing unreliable automation. Rather than relying on per-task post-hoc threshold search, the method prospectively converts a user-declared wrong-action budget into an auditable act-or-defer operating point before deployment, under explicitly stated assumptions.

</details>


### [440] [IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28556)
*Maria Xenochristou,Ashutosh Joshi,Korosh Vatanparvar,Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi,Prasad Kasu,Deepak Bansal,Anchal Nema,Nivedita Wadhwa,Prashams S Jain,Rebecca Abraham,Will Kimbrough,Dilek Hakkani-Tur,Wilko Schulz-Mahlendorf*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: IMCBench是一个基于图像的多轮医疗对话基准，用于评估多模态大模型在安全性、准确性和不确定性表达三个临床维度上的表现。实验表明，Claude Opus 4.6综合得分最高（3.61），但没有任何模型在所有维度上占优，且安全性与准确性并非正相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗AI基准存在碎片化问题：有些支持多轮对话但缺乏图像输入，有些提供多模态输入但仅聚焦单轮问答。缺乏同时具备图像和多轮对话能力的医疗基准，无法真实评估模型在临床场景中的表现。

Method: 构建IMCBench基准：将真实的公开临床图像与合成的患者档案配对，模拟真实的患者-临床医生多轮交互。通过LLM-as-Jury评分（经临床专家标注校准）从安全性、准确性、不确定性表达三个维度对模型进行1-5分评估。对8个多模态前沿模型（Claude、GPT、Nova、Llama四个系列）进行基准测试。

Result: Claude Opus 4.6综合得分最高（3.61），Claude Sonnet 4.6（3.30）和GPT-5.2（3.29）紧随其后。没有模型在所有维度上占优。安全维度在恶性和罕见条件下均有下降（Δ=-0.27）。消融实验表明，移除视觉输入或EHR上下文分别导致安全性平均下降0.18和0.23。

Conclusion: 准确的临床描述并不能保证安全的患者指导，这证明了在医疗AI中需要多维评估框架。视觉信息和EHR上下文对安全性均有贡献，且更强的模型能更有效地利用视觉特征。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and vision-language models have enabled reasoning over multimodal data, offering opportunities for clinical applications such as decision support and triaging. However, existing medical AI benchmarks are fragmented: some support multi-turn dialogues but lack images, while others provide multimodal inputs but focus on single-turn QA tasks. To address this gap, we introduce IMCBench, an image-grounded, multi-turn medical conversation benchmark that pairs real, publicly available clinical images with synthetic patient profiles to simulate realistic patient-clinician interactions. Each conversation is evaluated across three clinical dimensions: safety, accuracy, and appropriate use of uncertainty in diagnosis. We benchmark eight multimodal frontier models across four model families (Claude, GPT, Nova, and Llama), scoring each on a 1-5 scale using LLM-as-Jury scoring calibrated against expert clinician annotations. Our results show that Claude Opus 4.6 achieves the highest overall score (3.61), followed by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (3.30) and GPT-5.2 (3.29), though no model dominates all dimensions and safety degrades for both malignant and rare conditions ($Δ$ = -0.27 each). Ablation studies further reveal that both visual input and EHR context contribute to safe guidance (safety drops of 0.18 and 0.23 on average when each is removed), with stronger models leveraging visual features more effectively. Together, these findings demonstrate that accurate clinical description does not guarantee safe patient guidance, motivating the need for multi-dimensional evaluation frameworks in medical AI.

</details>


### [441] [Clarus: Coordinating Autonomous Research Agents toward Web-Scale Scientific Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30246)
*Zihan Guo,Zeyi Chen,Zhiyu Chen,Zicai Cui,Shuai Shao,Bo Huang,Zhi Han,Yuanyi Song,Yuan Yuan,Chenxi Zeng,Xiaohang Nie,Zhengxi Yu,Hanwen Zhu,Junwei Liao,Ming Zhou,Yang Li,Yuanjian Zhou,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Clarus，一个面向网络规模科学协作的开放基础设施，通过定义项目-智能体-资源对象模型和四层协作协议，将研究重构为可审计、可归因、资源感知的多阶段协作过程，支持AI系统、人类研究者、实验室等多元参与者协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主研究智能体多为孤立助手任务或封闭工作流，缺乏能协调项目、智能体、数字及物理资源的协作基础设施，无法支撑大规模、开放的科学协作。

Method: Clarus将研究重构为开放、可审计、可归因、资源感知的多阶段协作过程，定义项目-智能体-资源对象模型，构建研究应用、数字协作、物理基板、物理世界四层架构，核心模块采用可插拔机制以适应任务风险和资源约束。

Result: 通过受控论文生成案例研究，Clarus能够将研究目标组织为可追踪、可审查、可归因、可积累的协作网络，跨越阶段、任务和参与者。

Conclusion: Clarus的对象模型、协作协议、信任机制和原型验证为开放研究网络提供了初步基础，实现了从代码中心执行循环到研究导向协作过程的转变。

Abstract: Existing autonomous research agents can support parts of the research process, but most systems still treat research as either an isolated assistant task or a closed workflow. Therefore, autonomous science needs a collaboration infrastructure that coordinates projects, agents, and digital and physical resources. We identify this as a shift from code-centered execution loops to research-oriented collaboration processes, where questions, evidence, participants, and resources must be coordinated under uncertainty. In this framing, an agent may be an AI system, a human researcher, a team, a laboratory, or an organization-backed participant. To this end, we present Clarus, a collaboration infrastructure for coordinating autonomous research agents toward web-scale scientific collaboration. Clarus reformulates research as an open, auditable, attributable, and resource-aware multi-phase collaboration process. It defines a minimal project-agent-resource object model and organizes scientific collaboration through four layers including Research Application, Digital Collaboration, Physical Substrate, and Physical World. Core modules are implemented as pluggable mechanisms, allowing Clarus to adapt to task risk, collaboration structure, and resource constraints. Through a controlled paper-generation case study, we show that Clarus can organize a research goal into a traceable, reviewable, attributable, and accumulative collaboration network across phases, tasks, and participants. Together, the object model, collaboration protocol, trust mechanisms, and prototype validation provide an initial foundation for open research networks. Clarus is now available at clarus.holosai.io.

</details>


### [442] [Search for Truth from Reasoning: A Dynamic Representation Editing Framework for Steering LLM Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28589)
*Tianlong Wang,Yuhang Wang,Weibin Liao,Xin Gao,Xinyu Ma,Yang Lin,Yasha Wang,Liantao Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DynaSteer框架，通过动态表示编辑技术，在推理链早期高熵分叉点精准引导LLM朝向真实信息，在数学和代码任务上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有思维链等方法虽鼓励模型多思考，但难以引导模型走向真实；表示编辑（RepE）虽有内在控制能力，但在动态推理轨迹上的应用尚未充分探索。
